  <!DOCTYPE svg PUBLIC "-//W3C//DTD SVG 1.1//EN" "http://www.w3.org/Graphics/SVG/1.1/DTD/svg11.dtd">

          </image>
        </symbol>
        <style class="style-fonts">
          @font-face { font-family: Comic Shanns; src: url(data:font/woff2;base64,); }
      @font-face { font-family: Comic Shanns; src: url(data:font/woff2;base64,); }
      @font-face { font-family: Comic Shanns; src: url(data:font/woff2;base64,); }
        </style>
      </defs>
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="55429.17252357956" height="42854.09677188177" fill="#121212">
      </rect>
      <g transform="translate(1834.6679941026532 6189.549286358846) rotate(0 109 37.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Ne isteniyor :
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="67.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(1834.6679945508954 6370.546053243612) rotate(0 90 50)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Nasıl
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Kullanılacak:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="67.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="92.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(1834.6679945508954 6598.764736100755) rotate(0 95.5 37.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Çalışmanın
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          detayı:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="67.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(1834.667994122324 6933.244903386469) rotate(0 93.5 50)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Çalışmanın
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          ağırlık noktası:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="67.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="92.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(2113.1466368842284 6205.455662376167) rotate(0 -0.8120116000566782 1779.0647953076477)">
          <path d="M-0.03 1.13 C-0.11 594.12, -0.17 2964.66, -0.14 3557.46 M-1.51 0.67 C-1.78 593.34, -1.32 2963.02, -1.16 3555.58" stroke="#39994b" stroke-width="2" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g transform="translate(1887.0813627063235 6041.769366238812) rotate(0 1096.6666666666667 37.499999999999986)">
        <text x="0" y="52.49999999999998" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="59.99999999999997px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          1. İSTEK VEYA SORUNUN TESPİTİ
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(3135.9383305155743 6227.049285822649) rotate(0 314.44444444444446 24.999999999999986)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          b) Stratejik sorunun bu boyutlarına farklı açılardan bak
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          ve veri toplama yollarını belirle::
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(2183.7061606937527 6217.082196418215) rotate(0 297.22222222222223 25)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          a) Amacı gözden geçir ve en önemli hususların
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          listesini çıkar:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(4996.661675753387 6213.323697292241) rotate(0 346.66666666666674 25)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          c) Başlıkların ve görüşlerin bir listesini çıkar ve bir çalışma
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          formatı oluştur:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(3152.9345847929944 6293.461898862659) rotate(0 266.1111111111112 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#a954be" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Sorun:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(3123.3981312407386 6346.989177219732) rotate(0 260.55555555555554 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Farklı açılar;
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(3149.9204467231357 6490.911201642079) rotate(0 293.8888888888887 25)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#a98d84" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Ekonomk açı:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#a98d84" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(3151.9204462786925 6561.858075626205) rotate(0 311.1111111111111 37.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#007281" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Politik açı:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#007281" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="67.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#007281" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(4051.1664775028976 6266.844102107925) rotate(0 110 12.5)">
        <text x="110" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Veri Toplama Yolları
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(3907.9312002026736 6242.394551234428) rotate(0 278.4280759421458 1422.2951065045918)">
        <path d="M32 0 C195.07 0, 358.14 0, 524.86 0 M32 0 C130.58 0, 229.17 0, 524.86 0 M524.86 0 C546.19 0, 556.86 10.67, 556.86 32 M524.86 0 C546.19 0, 556.86 10.67, 556.86 32 M556.86 32 C556.86 1039.62, 556.86 2047.25, 556.86 2812.59 M556.86 32 C556.86 877.46, 556.86 1722.93, 556.86 2812.59 M556.86 2812.59 C556.86 2833.92, 546.19 2844.59, 524.86 2844.59 M556.86 2812.59 C556.86 2833.92, 546.19 2844.59, 524.86 2844.59 M524.86 2844.59 C416.07 2844.59, 307.29 2844.59, 32 2844.59 M524.86 2844.59 C373.67 2844.59, 222.49 2844.59, 32 2844.59 M32 2844.59 C10.67 2844.59, 0 2833.92, 0 2812.59 M32 2844.59 C10.67 2844.59, 0 2833.92, 0 2812.59 M0 2812.59 C0 1866.89, 0 921.19, 0 32 M0 2812.59 C0 2048.08, 0 1283.56, 0 32 M0 32 C0 10.67, 10.67 0, 32 0 M0 32 C0 10.67, 10.67 0, 32 0" stroke="#b86200" stroke-width="2" fill="none">
        </path>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(1822.4971545793696 9759.622329042835) rotate(0 2082.51512253917 -0.06313103288402999)">
          <path d="M-0.37 0.72 C693.71 0.42, 3470.94 -0.62, 4165.4 -0.84 M1.64 0.05 C695.49 -0.2, 3470.42 0.19, 4164.51 0.25" stroke="#d3d3d3" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(1818.7840035453876 5992.754465299373) rotate(0 -0.11401594231836043 5825.095320588532)">
          <path d="M-0.94 -0.9 C-1.06 1940.92, -0.13 9707.9, -0.04 11649.84 M0.77 1.24 C0.43 1943.32, -0.65 9709.87, -1 11651.09" stroke="#d3d3d3" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g transform="translate(1897.807813069197 9850.06280523331) rotate(0 713.6111111111119 70.00000000000023)">
        <text x="0" y="49.00000000000008" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="56.000000000000085px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          2- İhtiyaçların tespiti ve çalışma planının
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="119.0000000000002" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="56.000000000000085px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          yapılması
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(1953.712545458281 10078.177842043042) rotate(0 368 30.000000000000227)">
        <text x="0" y="14" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Analiz İhtiyaçları:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="34" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Sorunu çözmemiz için neyi bilmemiz gerekiyor yada hangi sorulara yanıt verirsek
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="54" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          ana sorunun yanıtını buluruz.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(1955.7034200399198 10174.084046494107) rotate(0 336.9015893562182 12.5)">
        <text x="336.9015893562182" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Sorun;
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(2825.1565860527858 10084.515713561228) rotate(0 -0.2596459407639031 455.03598867803794)">
          <path d="M-0.67 -0.9 C-0.8 151.07, -0.55 759.36, -0.49 910.98 M1.17 1.24 C0.82 152.97, -1.3 757.99, -1.69 909.36" stroke="#39994b" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g transform="translate(2883.372190944884 10099.515713561223) rotate(0 420.0000000000001 70)">
        <text x="0" y="14" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Analiz Hedefleri;
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="34" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Analiz ihtiyaçları kısmında sorulan soruları cevaplamak için neleri bilmemiz gerekiyor?
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="54" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="74" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          a) Açık
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="94" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          b) Gösterilebilir, yani teoriye, ampirik bir kanıta dayanan bir hipotez ile test edilebilir
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="114" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          olmalı
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="134" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          c) Ulaşılabilir olmalıdır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(5988.918562373721 10993.1307929263) rotate(0 -2080.039600710914 -0.07531646763891331)">
          <path d="M0.12 -0.95 C-693.07 -0.93, -3465.98 0.2, -4159.41 0.53 M-1.27 1.17 C-694.58 0.8, -3467.42 -1, -4160.2 -1.32" stroke="#39994b" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(3754.21610986231 10988.1307929263) rotate(0 -0.20196815723556938 -613.4384576382392)">
          <path d="M-0.18 -1.19 C-0.14 -205.63, -0.87 -1023.22, -0.91 -1227.67 M-1.73 0.8 C-1.22 -203.36, 1.27 -1021.62, 1.33 -1226.23" stroke="#39994b" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g transform="translate(3792.6399434744058 9874.804402807997) rotate(0 352.5 50)">
        <text x="0" y="14" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Anahtar faktör tespiti;
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="34" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="54" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          a) Öncelikle ana sorunun tam anlaşılması için gerek bilinen ve
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="74" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          bilinmeyen/bilinmesi gerken bütün faktörler sıralanmalıdır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="94" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(4475.356899614088 9920.062805405265) rotate(0 352.5 20)">
        <text x="0" y="14" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          b) Bu faktörler arasındaki ilişkiler kurulmalıdır. Önem sıralaması yapılmalı,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="34" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          diğer bağlantılar araştırılmalıdır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(5228.83458098323 9914.80440288702) rotate(0 352.5 30)">
        <text x="0" y="14" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          c) Anahtar faktörü tespit etmek yani diğer faktörlerden ayırmak için "Beklenen
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="34" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          sonuçla ilgili fikrinizin değişmesi için hangi faktörlerin değişmesi gerekir?"
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="54" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          sorusunun sorulması gerekir.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(1878.8633705748784 11081.966159069278) rotate(0 457.3695902681254 17.5)">
        <text x="0" y="24.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#905000" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          2.1 Çalışmanın Akış Sırası
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(1928.2770380340926 11152.359472933746) rotate(0 309.73283619493304 82.85714285714266)">
        <text x="0" y="19.33333333333328" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="22.09523809523803px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          1)  Sorun
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="46.95238095238082" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="22.09523809523803px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          2) Düşünce
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="74.57142857142836" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="22.09523809523803px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          3) Hipotez
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="102.19047619047589" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="22.09523809523803px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          4) Odaklanmış veri toplama ve tasnif ile ön analiz
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="129.80952380952343" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="22.09523809523803px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          5) Analiz
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="157.428571428571" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="22.09523809523803px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          6) Nihai değerlendirme
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(2869.7658333211352 11147.155081362278) rotate(0 353.38543232471557 96.40485424642293)">
        <text x="0" y="22.494465990831966" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="25.70796113237939px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          1)  Sorun
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="54.6294174063062" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="25.70796113237939px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          2) Düşünce
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="86.76436882178044" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="25.70796113237939px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          3) Veri, malumat, bilgi
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="118.89932023725467" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="25.70796113237939px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          4) Analiz
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="151.0342716527289" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="25.70796113237939px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          5) Hipotez
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="183.16922306820314" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="25.70796113237939px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          6) Test
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(1821.2651945305456 11676.141348975525) rotate(0 2083.33955010703 -0.02118680801231676)">
          <path d="M0.62 -0.33 C694.98 -0.5, 3472.83 -0.22, 4167.19 -0.02 M-0.51 -1.54 C693.58 -1, 3471.75 1.42, 4166.11 1.5" stroke="#39994b" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(3753.8478603005 10994.096123740674) rotate(0 0.48849933055589645 339.0923459183805)">
          <path d="M0.85 -0.36 C1.23 112.57, 1.13 565.26, 1.11 678.36 M-0.16 -1.59 C0.25 111.45, 0.66 566.29, 0.75 679.78" stroke="#39994b" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(5983.918562373721 9757.446336591192) rotate(0 -0.523424633041941 3978.7873308135518)">
          <path d="M-1.08 -0.52 C-1.23 1325.73, -0.45 6631.8, -0.43 7958.09 M0.56 1.83 C0.17 1327.66, -1.75 6630.11, -1.6 7956.18" stroke="#d3d3d3" stroke-width="4" fill="none">

        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(10189.918013057315 5997.446336591192) rotate(0 0.02631913195909874 5819.133361423323)">
          <path d="M-0.85 0.78 C-0.94 1940.5, 0.08 9698.69, 0.19 11638.13 M0.91 0.14 C0.61 1939.51, -0.33 9696.5, -0.66 11636.23" stroke="#d3d3d3" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g transform="translate(3808.7161095508955 11080.96615924361) rotate(0 115.49995422363281 17.5)">
        <text x="0" y="24.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Kavramsal Model
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(3810.7161091832454 11213.327289115) rotate(0 653.3914184570312 85.35714285714312)">
        <text x="0" y="23.900000000000066" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="27.314285714285788px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          1) Kavramsal model durumla ilgili bir zihinsel fotoğraftır
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="58.0428571428573" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="27.314285714285788px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          2) Amacı temel konsept ve kişiler, faaliyetler, yapılar gibi faktörlerin anlaşılmasıdır
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="92.18571428571454" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="27.314285714285788px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          3) Modeller önyargıları aşmaya yardımcı olur
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="126.32857142857178" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="27.314285714285788px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          4) kavramsal modeller araştırma için gerekli çıkış noktalarıdır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="160.47142857142902" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="27.314285714285788px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          5) Modeller, yeni veriler geldikçe değişebilir.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(5436.196340151499 11678.779669924526) rotate(0 0.21781275277953682 -340.7091942492875)">
          <path d="M0.05 0.96 C-0.13 -112.88, -0.63 -568.45, -0.58 -682.38 M-1.39 0.41 C-1.21 -113.3, 1.63 -567.37, 1.82 -681.03" stroke="#39994b" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g transform="translate(1931.1341805508955 11741.06538421024) rotate(0 288.75 17.5)">
        <text x="0" y="24.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Çalışma Planı
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(1932.5653877705463 11810.886812781668) rotate(0 480.26785714285177 31.428571428571104)">
        <text x="0" y="21.99999999999976" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="25.142857142856865px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu aşamada hipotezleri doğrulamak için hangi tür veri malumat, ve
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="53.42857142857084" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="25.142857142856865px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          bilgilerin toplanmaya yönelineleneceği ortaya çıkmıştır;
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(1920.950309122324 11993.077508353097) rotate(0 475.714285714286 85.71428571428578)">
        <text x="0" y="24.00000000000003" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="27.428571428571463px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          1) Hangi belgelere ihtiyaç duyulacağına
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="58.285714285714356" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="27.428571428571463px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          2) Bu belgeleri nerede bulunacağı
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="92.57142857142868" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="27.428571428571463px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          3) Kimlerle görüşüleceği
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="126.857142857143" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="27.428571428571463px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          4) Bunlar için ne kadar süreye
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="161.14285714285734" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="27.428571428571463px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          5) Eğer gereli ise ekonomik kaynağa
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(5988.655640865188 5996.0805090071135) rotate(0 16472.593966636712 0.6913404195941979)">
          <path d="M1.01 0.42 C5491.94 0.26, 27454.47 0.26, 32945.11 0.17 M0.08 -0.41 C5490.94 0.17, 27453.76 1.54, 32944.46 1.8" stroke="#d3d3d3" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g transform="translate(6043.575414148819 6043.698778939366) rotate(0 822.2222222222217 34.99999999999997)">
        <text x="0" y="48.99999999999996" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="55.99999999999995px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          3- Veri, Haber ve Bilginin Toplanması
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(1818.9966659929369 5995.504714034284) rotate(0 2084.9457612886176 -0.23368440952152092)">
          <path d="M-0.4 -0.51 C694.29 -0.72, 3473.26 -0.25, 4168.2 -0.11 M1.6 -1.83 C696.63 -1.33, 3475.82 0.76, 4170.29 1.36" stroke="#d3d3d3" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(5987.49715457937 9760.504714034283) rotate(0 -0.6040849380278814 -1881.4665903415125)">
          <path d="M-0.19 -0.56 C0.07 -627.85, 0.65 -3137.49, 0.52 -3764.7 M-1.75 1.77 C-1.51 -625.29, -0.68 -3135.47, -0.16 -3763.43" stroke="#d3d3d3" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g transform="translate(3152.4762605869264 6410.690229188727) rotate(0 373.3333333333336 32.00000000000006)">
        <text x="0" y="14.933333333333355" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="17.06666666666669px" fill="#ff8383" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Sosyolojik açı:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="36.26666666666672" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="17.06666666666669px" fill="#ff8383" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="57.60000000000008" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="17.06666666666669px" fill="#ff8383" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(6039.700309402742 6263.323697474444) rotate(0 343.0339921958971 104.94921089909434)">
        <text x="0" y="20.989842179818876" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="23.988391062650145px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Kaynakları üç temel kategoriye ayırabiliriz. Bunlar;
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="50.97533100813156" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="23.988391062650145px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="80.96081983644424" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="23.988391062650145px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          1) Birincil ve ikincil kaynaklar,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="110.94630866475693" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="23.988391062650145px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="140.9317974930696" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="23.988391062650145px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          2) Tesadüfi ve muntazam kaynaklar,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="170.91728632138228" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="23.988391062650145px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="200.90277514969497" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="23.988391062650145px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          3) Açık ve kapalı kaynaklar.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(8108.079640481669 6080.303481101897) rotate(0 384.2738907295834 28.172583799835337)">
        <text x="0" y="39.44161731976948" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.07613407973655px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Veri toplamada genel prensipler
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(6954.550791096148 6163.209358796358) rotate(0 -0.6806419567560624 1186.1558285890346)">
          <path d="M0.2 -0.7 C0.08 394.4, -0.39 1976.05, -0.36 2371.46 M-1.16 1.55 C-1.49 396.78, -1.65 1977.74, -1.5 2373.01" stroke="#b595ff" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(8038.984227399688 6017.297181769107) rotate(0 -0.3692943973319416 1262.3457164931347)">
          <path d="M0.49 0.77 C0.27 421.25, -0.18 2103, -0.13 2523.42 M-0.71 0.12 C-1.2 420.7, -1.34 2103.89, -1.15 2524.57" stroke="#b86200" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g transform="translate(8135.036761324432 6239.219708709716) rotate(0 203.5 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          a. Veri Toplamada Amaç Saptanmalıdır:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(8135.036761719275 6882.082564758897) rotate(0 247.5 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          b. Hangi Verilerin Toplanacağı Saptanmalıdır:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(8114.389270818221 7686.572058128041) rotate(0 209 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          c. Veri Toplama Tekniği Saptanmalıdır:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(9404.261499627817 7286.968082788417) rotate(0 297 25)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          d. Değerlendirmenin Nasıl ve Kim Tarafından Yapılacağı
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Saptanmalıdır:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(9351.461572200446 6243.6651704231135) rotate(0 335.50000000000045 25)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          e. Verinin Nasıl Saklanacağı ve Kullanıcıların Nasıl Yararla-
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          nacağı Saptanmalıdır:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(5997.134524841819 6630.443916045456) rotate(0 287.2925662337366 17.5)">
        <text x="0" y="24.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Verinin Özellikleri
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(6017.593832646885 6727.6155728797) rotate(0 434.2574103467041 462.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          a. Veri Doğru Olmalıdır:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="67.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Yan tutulmadan, dürüst bir şekilde ve doğru veri toplamayı etkileyen etmenleri
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="92.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          olabildiğince azaltarak toplanan veri doğru veridir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="117.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="142.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="167.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="192.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="217.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          b. Veri Güvenilir Olmalıdır:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="242.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="267.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Aynı soruya, değişik zamanlarda değişik kişilerce her sorulduğunda aynı cevap
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="292.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          alınabiliyorsa bu veri güvenilirdir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="317.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="342.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="367.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="392.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="417.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          c. Veri Kullanılabilir Olmalıdır:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="442.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="467.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Toplanan veriler başkaları tarafından da kullanılabiliyorsa veya
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="492.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          denetlenebiliyor ise bu veri kullanılabilir bir veridir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="517.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="542.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="567.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="592.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          d. Veri Yararlı Olmalıdır:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="617.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="642.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Toplanan veri belirli bir konuyu aydınlatabiliyor veya bir probleme çözüm
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="667.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          sağlayabiliyor ise bu veri yararlı bir veridir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="692.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="717.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="742.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="767.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="792.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          e. Veri Eksiksiz Olmalıdır:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="817.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="842.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bir konuyu aydınlatabilmek için konu ile ilgili olduğu düşünülen ve bu amaçla
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="867.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          başlanan bütün verilerin Toplanmasına çaba, gösterilmelidir. Aksi durumda
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="892.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          konunun açıklanması güçleşebilir. Ya da konunun bir kısmının eksik kalmasına
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="917.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          ve araştırmamız hakkında şüphe uyanmasına neden olabilir.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(6107.957130571166 6609.1155728797) rotate(0 448.5568916518073 -175.45199067929724)">
          <path d="M-0.83 0.75 C148.45 -57.51, 746.18 -291.41, 895.6 -350.02 M0.93 0.11 C150.61 -58.44, 749 -293.37, 897.95 -351.66" stroke="#56a2e8" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
        <g transform="translate(6107.957130571166 6609.1155728797) rotate(0 448.5568916518073 -175.45199067929724)">
          <path d="M879.2 -335.12 C886.02 -341.01, 891.81 -345.69, 897.95 -351.66 M879.2 -335.12 C884.96 -339.76, 890.33 -345.86, 897.95 -351.66" stroke="#56a2e8" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
        <g transform="translate(6107.957130571166 6609.1155728797) rotate(0 448.5568916518073 -175.45199067929724)">
          <path d="M872.95 -351.04 C881.54 -352.22, 889.17 -352.23, 897.95 -351.66 M872.95 -351.04 C880.73 -350.87, 887.98 -352.17, 897.95 -351.66" stroke="#56a2e8" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g transform="translate(7009.627748957076 6234.144578301224) rotate(0 496.331136735791 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Verinin Özelliklerini Etkileyebilecek Etmenler
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(6981.289555428261 6325.551767586705) rotate(0 532.5 212.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          A) Veri Kaynağı;
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Yararlanılacak akyıtların düzenli, doğru ve gerekli tüm bilgileri içermemesi
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="67.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="92.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Aneket vb verilerin samimi ve dürüst olmayan yanıtlar vermesi
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="117.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="142.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Gözlen yapan kişinin yan tutması, yanılması.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="167.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="192.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          B)  Bilgi Toplama Formları;
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="217.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="242.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          kolayca kullanılabilecek şekilde hazırlanmamış formlar, kolay anlaşılır soruların olmaması.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="267.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="292.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          C)  Veri Toplayan Personel;
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="317.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="342.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Gayret, sabır, titizlik ve dürüst olmalı, çıkacak sonuçla ilgili endişe duymamalı.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="367.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="392.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="417.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(5997.401412917121 8543.181394905918) rotate(0 2075.8325483546823 0.4403504012805115)">
          <path d="M0.69 0.23 C692.64 0.1, 3460.37 0.13, 4152.08 0.03 M-0.41 -0.7 C691.39 -0.69, 3459.03 1.34, 4151.34 1.58" stroke="#b595ff" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g transform="translate(6073.785854639261 8576.442343296983) rotate(0 357.5 17.5)">
        <text x="0" y="24.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Klasik  Veri Toplama Teknikleri
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(6143.785854639261 8711.442343296983) rotate(0 115.5 62.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          A) Yazılı Kaynaklar
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          B) Gözlem
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="67.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          C) İçerik Çözümlemesi
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="92.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          D) Soru Kağıdı
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="117.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          E) Görüşmeler
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(6850.452521305928 8633.10900996365) rotate(0 104.5 25)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          A) Yazılı Kaynaklar
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(6832.119187972594 8740.009491664003) rotate(0 528 162.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Genellikle alan araştırmalarına başlamadan önce konuyla ilgili daha önceden yapılmış çalışmalar
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          ve derlenmiş bilgi kaynaklarından yararlanılır. Yazılı kaynaklar da kendi içinde gruplanır;
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="67.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="92.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          1. Kitaplar, dergiler, çeşitli istatistiki kaynaklar, resmi rapor ve
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="117.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          yazışmalar, kurum kayıtları.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="142.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="167.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="192.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          3. Kişisel belgeler, bilim adamı, siyaset adamı, gazeteci yazar gibi
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="217.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          toplumda belirli isim yapmış kişilerin arşivlerinden.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="242.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="267.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          4. Dolaylı belgeler, araştırma konusuyla doğrudan ilgili olmasa
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="292.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          bile dolaylı olarak konuya ışık tutabilecek belgeler (Rehber, yıllık,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="317.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          ansiklopedi ve sözlüklerle diğer teknik belgeler).
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(7995.582151119784 8631.966618453305) rotate(0 49.5 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          B) Gözlem
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(8010.765712788579 8720.031276132315) rotate(0 379.5 50)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Gözlem, günlük sıradan olaylar üzerinde yapılabileceği gibi, en
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          karmaşık laboratuvar deneylerini de kapsamına alabilen bir tekniktir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="67.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu nedenle hem basit hem de gelişmiş bir teknik olarak algılanabilir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="92.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Basit ve sistematik olarak iki grupta incelenir:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(8012.955934277233 8957.140228453203) rotate(0 396 100)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Basit gözlem standart bir tekniğe dayanmayan, tekrarlanması
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          rastlantılara bağlı olan gözlemdir. Küçük topluluklarda ya da belirli
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="67.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          kurumlarda çalışanların yaşam biçimlerini, davranış ve tutumlarını
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="92.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          inceleyebilen bir tekniktir. İnsanlara "Neden böyle yaptınız ya da
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="117.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          yapıyorsunuz?, Neden böyle düşünüyorsunuz?" gibi sorular yerine
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="142.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          ne yaptıklarını, nasıl davrandıklarını gözlemek, b.ir çeşit çevrede olup
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="167.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          bitenin fotoğrafını çekmek ya da resmini yapmak biçiminde algılanacak
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="192.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          bir tekniktir.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(8000.3530946402825 8926.854977463423) rotate(0 82.5 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          1. Basit Gözlem
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(8013.051052644284 9204.853239902326) rotate(0 86.08592224121094 30.10142092219212)">
        <text x="0" y="21.07099464553442" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="24.08113673775362px" fill="#056715" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          a. Katılımlı
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="51.172415567726446" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="24.08113673775362px" fill="#056715" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          b. Katılımsız
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(8009.09643582688 9315.582510789622) rotate(0 418 250)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#16842a" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          a) Katılımlı gözlemde, gözlemcinin standart bir gözlem aracı kullanmaksızın
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#16842a" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          gözlediği olaya doğrudan katılarak gözlemde bulunmasıdır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="67.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#16842a" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="92.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#16842a" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Burada gözlemcinin kimliğinin saklanması ve kendisini grubun bir üyesi
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="117.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#16842a" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          gibi kabul ettirmesi söz konusudur.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="142.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#16842a" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="167.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#16842a" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu tekniğin yararlı yanı; gözlenen olayı yaratan kişilerin araştırma
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="192.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#16842a" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          bilmemeleri sonucunda herhangi bir duygusal yönlendirme ya da etki
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="217.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#16842a" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          olmaksızın olayların kendi akışı içinde cereyan etme şansına sahip
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="242.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#16842a" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          olmasıdır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="267.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#16842a" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="292.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#16842a" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="317.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#16842a" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          b) Katılımsız gözlemde, katılımlı gözlemin tam tersi bir durumla
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="342.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#16842a" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          karşılaşılmaktadır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="367.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#16842a" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="392.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#16842a" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Araştırıcı ya da gözlemci gözleyeceği olayın ya da grubun dışında kalmaya
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="417.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#16842a" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          özen gösterir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="442.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#16842a" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Öte yandan durumu dışardan izleyebilmek gözlemciye olaylara geniş
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="467.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#16842a" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          açıdan bakabilmeyi ve nesnel olabilmeyi sağlar.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="492.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#16842a" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(8985.773979259266 8630.841509457576) rotate(0 110 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          2. Sistematik Gözlem
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(9010.067677929337 8687.020687632117) rotate(0 533.4999999999995 50)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Kullandığı standartlaştıncı araçlarla toplanan verileri denetleme olanağına sahip bir tekniktir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Gözlemci alana çıkarken bir gözlem anahtarı, başka bir deyişle gözlem yaparken hangi
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="67.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          noktalardan bilgi toplanacağını belirleyen bir çizelgeye sahiptir. Böylece gözlemleri
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="92.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          standartlaştırmak amacıyla toplanacak verinin çerçevesi çizilir.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(9008.549321762457 8841.893016653825) rotate(0 500.5 25)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Araştırıcıların gerek katılımlı gerekse sistematik gözlemde gözlemlerine temel oluşturacak
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          bir gözlem rehberini ayrıntıların unutulmaması için hazırlamaları gerekmektedir.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(6001.331301742671 10082.112575422825) rotate(0 2077.858889525071 -0.735149532794594)">
          <path d="M0.18 -0.2 C692.88 -0.25, 3464.23 0.1, 4156.9 0.27 M-1.18 -1.36 C691.29 -1.83, 3463.25 -1.76, 4155.96 -1.7" stroke="#a954be" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(6002.16643495401 11252.995701986581) rotate(0 2078.486592468097 0.6424217841718018)">
          <path d="M-0.35 1.01 C692.48 1.03, 3464.58 -0.11, 4157.32 -0.12 M1.67 0.5 C694.35 0.73, 3463.79 1.59, 4156.6 1.36" stroke="#b595ff" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(6012.16643495401 12956.329035319915) rotate(0 2078.2915635478353 0.267509315908228)">
          <path d="M0.47 1.07 C693.32 0.86, 3464.76 -0.17, 4157.33 -0.54 M-0.75 0.59 C691.97 0.47, 3463.44 0.88, 4156.62 0.72" stroke="#b86200" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g transform="translate(6091.651800929983 10180.341906673204) rotate(0 152.4600000000014 16.5)">
        <text x="0" y="23.10000000000024" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="26.400000000000276px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          C) İçerik Çözümlemesi
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(6061.79465807284 10316.841906673204) rotate(0 632.5 25)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          içerik çözümlemesi yazılı metinler (kitap, dergi, gazete, afış, sloganlar ve radyo yayınları,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          mülakatlar, filmler, TV programları üzerinde uygulanır. Genel olarak içerik çözümlemesi bir iletişim incelemesidir.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(6061.79465807284 10441.841906673204) rotate(0 782.5 139.73214285714266)">
        <text x="0" y="16.30208333333333" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="18.630952380952372px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          1. Pragmatik (Faydacı) Çözümleme:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="39.590773809523796" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="18.630952380952372px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="62.87946428571426" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="18.630952380952372px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          işaretierin etkilerine göre sınıflandırma, örneğin mesajın verildiği zamanlardaki sıklığın sayılarak nasıl bir etkisi olacağını ortaya çıkarmak;
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="86.16815476190473" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="18.630952380952372px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="109.4568452380952" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="18.630952380952372px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          2. Anlam Bilimsel Çözümleme:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="132.74553571428567" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="18.630952380952372px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="156.03422619047615" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="18.630952380952372px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Sözcüklerin anlamları.na göre sayma ile ilgili kümelendirme. Örneğin bir mesajda kaç kez doğrudan ya da dolaylı, "Atatürk" sözcüğünün
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="179.32291666666657" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="18.630952380952372px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          geçtiğinin bulunması üzerine;
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="202.61160714285705" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="18.630952380952372px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="225.90029761904754" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="18.630952380952372px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          3. İşaret Aracı Olarak Çözümleme:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="249.18898809523802" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="18.630952380952372px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
