        <text x="0" y="272.47767857142844" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="18.630952380952372px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bir mesajın içeriğinin işaretierin özelliklerine göre sıklığının sayılması. Örneğin bir mesajda "Amerika" sözcüğünün kaç kez geçtiğinin sayılması gibi.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(7811.806562834745 10166.984763816063) rotate(0 302.720000000003 21.5)">
        <text x="0" y="30.10000000000031" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.400000000000354px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          İçerik Çözümlemesinin Uygulanışı
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(7861.806562834745 10300.984763816063) rotate(0 107 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Kelimenin Analizi:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(7861.899356978099 10727.174420113464) rotate(0 170.5 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Cümle ve Paragratların Analizi;
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(7865.806562834745 10416.984763816063) rotate(0 420 100)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Burada iki tür analiz yapılır. Birisi tüm kelimeleri göz önünde tutarak,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          diğeri ise seçilmiş kelimeleri ele alarak Birinci tür analiz yan kelimelerin
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="67.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          genel analizi ise toplumsal bilimlerde
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="92.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          kullanılmaktadır. Kilit kelimeleri içeren listelerin yapılmasından sonra
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="117.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          bunların inceleme yapılan metindeki tekrar ediliş sayıları saptanır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="142.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Örneğin; dünya basını hakkında yapılan karşılaştırmalı bir araştırmada,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="167.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          seçilmiş gazetelerin başyazılarında kullanılan kilit kelimelerin ne denli
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="192.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          sıklıkla kullanıldıkları saptanmıştır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(7881.878822128795 10805.453672533933) rotate(0 599.5 37.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Burada analiz birimi birbirine bağlanmış bir grup kelimedir. Bu da ya bir cümle ya da bir paragraf olabilir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Toplumsal bilimlerde kullanılan bu analiz türünde bir konunun paragraf içindeki sıklığı saptanır. Genellikle
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="67.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          haberleşmenin kanaatler üzerindeki etkileri ile ilgili analizlerdir.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(6061.712263124302 11315.510626832474) rotate(0 77 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          D) Soru Kağıdı
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(6077.505249355796 11398.52175239812) rotate(0 368.5 50)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Toplumu ilgilendiren çeşitli konularda objektif bilgi toplamak için
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          kullanılan bir araçtır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="67.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Burada önemli olan, hazırlanan soru kağıdının doğrudan doğruya
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="92.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          sorulmak istenen kişi tarafından okunarak cevaplandırılmasıdır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(7276.901902858314 11313.958757271075) rotate(0 99 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          E) Görüşme-Mülakat
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(7297.076209413874 11398.52175269703) rotate(0 538.7716007502895 62.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Araştırılan konuda sözlü olarak bilgi toplama tekniğidir. Bu amaçla hazırlanan görüşme cetveli ve
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          görüşme anahtarlarından yararlanılır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="67.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="92.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Görüşme cetveli (formu, çizelgesi) ve görüşme anahtarı olarak isimlenen diğer iki tip soru kağıdı
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="117.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          görüşme tekniğinde kullanılan bilgi toplama araçlarıdır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(7301.66304735832 11590.853913419363) rotate(0 529.0376964910247 50)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Sorular standart olarak hazırlanmamıştır. Bu tür uygulamalarda görüşmeciye geniş yetkiler
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          tanınmaktadır. Geniş, derinlemesine, ayrıntılı bilgi toplamak istenen özel durumlarda
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="67.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          kullanılır. Görüşmeciye soru sormada, bilgi toplamada içerik, biçim ve özellik zaman bakımından
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="92.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          büyük bir özgürlük, duruma göre hareket etme olanağı sağlamaktadır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(5999.564230680484 11993.267009475683) rotate(0 2082.502005237076 0.2587085601112449)">
          <path d="M-0.95 -1.06 C693.18 -1.21, 3471.28 0, 4165.96 0.01 M0.75 1 C694.59 0.97, 3470.48 1.76, 4164.8 1.56" stroke="#39994b" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g transform="translate(6126.297305478344 12135.841718623276) rotate(0 161.8154296875 20.433635990691528)">
        <text x="0" y="28.60709038696807" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="32.693817585106366px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Veri Toplama Planı
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(6137.825442416397 12271.788526500985) rotate(0 447.51012740058286 140)">
        <text x="0" y="24.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          * Odaklanmış bir veri toplama çalışmasını kolaylaştırır
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="59.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="94.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          * Gereksiz zaman kaybını engeller
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="129.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="164.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          * Gerekli olduğu miktarda veri toplanmasını sağlar
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="199.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="234.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          * Daha veri toplama aşamasında verilerin ne ile ilintili
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="269.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          olduğunun anlaşılmasını sağlar.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(6128.7440364916365 12642.835297530131) rotate(0 590.9960990482032 83.67032305088424)">
        <text x="0" y="29.284613067809545" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="33.46812922035376px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          1) Neye ihtiyaç duyulduğu tespit edilir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="71.11977459325175" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="33.46812922035376px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          2) Bilinen hususlar tespit edilir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="112.95493611869395" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="33.46812922035376px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          3) Gerekli ve eksik olan bilgiler tespit edilir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="154.79009764413615" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="33.46812922035376px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Sonra bir öncelikler listesi yaparak VTP'yi tamamlanır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(7316.503749768007 12621.365769226137) rotate(0 617.7391166316465 85.26377819956133)">
        <text x="0" y="29.842322369846517" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.10551127982459px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          VTP,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="72.47421146962725" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.10551127982459px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          A) Araştırılan bilgi kaynaklarını,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="115.10610056940799" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.10551127982459px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          B) Toplanmak istenen özel verileri,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="157.73798966918872" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.10551127982459px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          C) Bilgiyi ne zaman istediğinizi içermelidir.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(6938.32119814124 12691.18408644954) rotate(0 145.65569958097512 0.5135660749797353)">
          <path d="M1.2 -0.17 C49.51 0.23, 242.53 1.97, 290.94 2.32 M0.37 -1.3 C48.42 -1.27, 241.52 -0.36, 290.01 0.4" stroke="#905000" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
        <g transform="translate(6938.32119814124 12691.18408644954) rotate(0 145.65569958097512 0.5135660749797353)">
          <path d="M266.44 8.74 C275.39 5.3, 285.53 3.29, 290.01 0.4 M266.44 8.74 C274.24 7.19, 280.77 3.14, 290.01 0.4" stroke="#905000" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
        <g transform="translate(6938.32119814124 12691.18408644954) rotate(0 145.65569958097512 0.5135660749797353)">
          <path d="M266.6 -8.36 C275.48 -5.11, 285.56 -0.43, 290.01 0.4 M266.6 -8.36 C274.52 -4.77, 281 -3.69, 290.01 0.4" stroke="#905000" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(7659.549418070727 10228.84756004673) rotate(0 -0.8764760074245714 512.3662959536168)">
          <path d="M-0.57 0.1 C-0.97 171.05, -2.96 854.71, -3.09 1025.62 M1.34 -0.89 C1.39 169.76, -0.21 853.33, -0.69 1024.11" stroke="#b86200" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(7131.158934924481 11253.304373538731) rotate(0 -0.7182255415978034 371.8496212112177)">
          <path d="M0.27 1.09 C0.22 125.13, -0.55 619.6, -0.46 743.09 M-1.04 0.61 C-1.28 124.38, -1.9 617.41, -1.65 741.12" stroke="#b595ff" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(6755.532498765187 8685.78385471106) rotate(0 -5.208479837603136 697.0177244306869)">
          <path d="M-1.19 1.17 C-2.84 233.1, -9.31 1159.95, -10.81 1391.93 M0.39 0.74 C-0.81 232.81, -6.61 1161.57, -8.52 1393.3" stroke="#a954be" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(7903.504005885227 8676.401488171108) rotate(0 0.5030538955934389 702.0711428449117)">
          <path d="M-0.47 0.43 C-0.39 234.35, 0.77 1169.68, 0.65 1403.56 M1.48 -0.4 C1.44 233.64, 0.11 1170.39, 0.04 1404.54" stroke="#a954be" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(8879.578712983915 8676.401488171108) rotate(0 -0.16479415142430298 703.2689037427124)">
          <path d="M-1 -0.78 C-0.92 233.94, -0.07 1172.71, 0.21 1407.32 M0.67 1.42 C0.64 235.92, -0.56 1171.81, -0.63 1405.71" stroke="#a954be" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g transform="translate(6106.750555041337 13015.368559118191) rotate(0 205.26194763183594 20.27777777777783)">
        <text x="0" y="28.388888888888765" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="32.4444444444443px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          1) İhtiyaçların Tespiti
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(7712.248218581974 12980.223586549531) rotate(0 -0.3180709633979859 2308.3436555913922)">
          <path d="M1.72 -1.98 C1.45 767.56, -2.08 3845.18, -2.77 4614.99 M-0.78 3.12 C-0.15 773.35, 1.48 3850.44, 2.13 4618.66" stroke="#b86200" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g transform="translate(7925.581551915307 13011.890253216196) rotate(0 484.3797766019934 27.053125820856167)">
        <text x="0" y="37.874376149198426" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="43.285001313369634px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          3) Öncelik Sırası
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(10237.736313820067 6074.116443692397) rotate(0 2055.092592592596 36.0542560103964)">
        <text x="0" y="50.47595841455496" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="57.686809616634235px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          4- Toplana Veri, Haber ve Bilginin Karşılaştırılarak Güvenilirliğinin Test Edilmesi, Değerlendirme ve Doğrulanarak Düzenlenmesi
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(15807.736618820065 6074.116443692397) rotate(0 2169.0908530906454 38.054225492818276)">
        <text x="0" y="53.27591568994563" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="60.886760788509285px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          6- Veri, H aber ve Bilginin Entegrasyon, Analiz ve Sentezinin Yapılarak Yorumlanması
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(10330.8196471534 6196.533110359064) rotate(0 795 17.5)">
        <text x="0" y="24.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Araştırmacı, kaynakların hakimiyetine girmemeli, onları denetim altında tutmalıdır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(10335.343456677208 6346.295015120966) rotate(0 2007.3529411764703 583.6764705882356)">
        <text x="0" y="30.26470588235295" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.58823529411766px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          a) Doğrulama Yöntemi:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="73.50000000000003" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.58823529411766px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="116.7352941176471" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.58823529411766px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bilgi tarihsel bir sıralama ile veya konusuna göre
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="159.97058823529417" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.58823529411766px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          dosyada toplanır ve her dosyanın içinde ne olduğunu gösteren bir kağıda kaydedilir;
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="203.20588235294125" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.58823529411766px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="246.44117647058832" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.58823529411766px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          b) Karta İşleme Yöntemi:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="289.67647058823536" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.58823529411766px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="332.91176470588243" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.58823529411766px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bilgiler kategorilerini veya aralarındaki
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="376.1470588235295" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.58823529411766px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          ilişkiyi yansıtacak şekilde, üzerinde hangi konu ile ilgili olduğu kısa ve
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="419.3823529411766" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.58823529411766px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          net bir anlatım ile not alınarak;
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="462.61764705882365" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.58823529411766px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="505.8529411764707" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.58823529411766px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="549.0882352941178" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.58823529411766px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          c) Harita ve Şemalar Yöntemi:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="592.3235294117649" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.58823529411766px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="635.5588235294119" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.58823529411766px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Haritalar olayların gerçekleştiği
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="678.794117647059" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.58823529411766px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          yerlerin işlenmesi, şemalar istatistik! verilerin şemaya dökülmesi ile
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="722.0294117647061" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.58823529411766px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          oluşurlar;
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="765.2647058823532" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.58823529411766px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="808.5000000000002" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.58823529411766px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          ç) Özetler Yöntemi:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="851.7352941176473" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.58823529411766px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="894.9705882352944" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.58823529411766px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Olayların ana hatlarının gerektiğinde periyodik
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="938.2058823529414" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.58823529411766px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          şekilde karta işlenmesidir ki, bu yöntem hızlı gelişmeleri kolay izlemeyi sağlar;
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="981.4411764705885" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.58823529411766px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1024.6764705882356" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.58823529411766px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          d) Bilgisayar Programları Yöntemi:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1067.9117647058827" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.58823529411766px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1111.1470588235297" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.58823529411766px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Önceden belirlenmiş başlık-
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1154.3823529411768" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="34.58823529411766px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          lar altında bilginin depolanması, kaydı için kullanılır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(10178.676790010544 7635.295015120968) rotate(0 2737.9397687992496 -0.1378651780388509)">

          Kaynak Değerlendirme
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(10457.0696471534 7847.08469766065) rotate(0 1003.333333333333 381.66666666666674)">

      </mask>
      <g transform="translate(10726.124988153399 7881.6213283273155) rotate(0 79.72041227962927 25.883840385517033)">
        <text x="0" y="36.23737653972383" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.41414461682724px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Kaynak
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(11920.402980486731 7890.418030993983) rotate(0 59.49997311546667 27.04545304419571)">
        <text x="0" y="37.86363426187394" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="43.27272487071308px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Haber
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(10533.736313820064 7973.751364327316) rotate(0 840.6002197265625 192.5)">
        <text x="0" y="24.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          (1) Tamamen güvenilir                                             (a) Tamamen doğru, diğer bilgilerle teyidli
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="59.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="94.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          (2) Genellikle inanılır                                           (b) Olması kuvvetle muhtemel
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="129.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="164.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          (3) İnanılır                                                      (c) Doğru olması mümkün
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="199.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="234.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          ( 4) Genellikle inanılmaz                                         (d) Doğruluğu şüpheli
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="269.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="304.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          (S) İnanılmaz                                                     (e) Güvenilmez
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="339.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="374.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          (6) İnanılırlığı tayin olunamaz                                   (f) Doğruluğu hakkında hüküm
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(10177.0696471534 8895.418030993984) rotate(0 2735.490984796067 -0.5122594124497937)">
          <path d="M-0.37 -0.25 C911.03 -0.19, 4557.26 0.34, 5469.11 0.53 M1.63 -1.43 C913.35 -1.74, 4559.9 -1.39, 5471.36 -1.32" stroke="#39994b" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>

      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(12702.0696471534 7640.418030993983) rotate(0 -0.38627162724242226 628.3509026554134)">
          <path d="M0.46 1.06 C0.42 210.23, -0.2 1045.81, -0.15 1254.73 M-0.77 0.58 C-0.97 209.95, -1.36 1046.94, -1.18 1256.12" stroke="#39994b" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g transform="translate(12862.0696471534 6311.418092029139) rotate(0 447.6997239854609 27.500000000000057)">
        <text x="0" y="38.50000000000007" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="44.000000000000085px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Verilerin Karşılaştırmalı Düzenlemesi
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(12897.0696471534 6471.418092029139) rotate(0 970.2994995117188 67.5)">
        <text x="0" y="31.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="36px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu aşamada analizci hangi faktörlerle ilgili verilerin eksik olduğunu tespit etmelidir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="76.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="36px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Sonra bu faktörlerle ilgili alternatif hipotezler geliştirmeli, elde veri olup olmamasının normali
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="121.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="36px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          mi sıradışı mı yoksa yetersiz araştırma neticesi mi olduğunu tespit etmelidir.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(15651.0696471534 8895.08469766065) rotate(0 -0.04345540702342987 -1433.142250133067)">
          <path d="M-1.01 -0.74 C-0.98 -478.48, 0.59 -2388.36, 0.92 -2866 M0.66 1.48 C0.55 -476.63, 0.45 -2389.98, 0.46 -2867.77" stroke="#39994b" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(5918.210134832248 2978.1341171550985) rotate(0 2520 1265)">
        <path d="M32 0 C1815.75 0, 3599.5 0, 5008 0 M32 0 C1428.56 0, 2825.13 0, 5008 0 M5008 0 C5029.33 0, 5040 10.67, 5040 32 M5008 0 C5029.33 0, 5040 10.67, 5040 32 M5040 32 C5040 527.2, 5040 1022.4, 5040 2498 M5040 32 C5040 1010.18, 5040 1988.36, 5040 2498 M5040 2498 C5040 2519.33, 5029.33 2530, 5008 2530 M5040 2498 C5040 2519.33, 5029.33 2530, 5008 2530 M5008 2530 C4006.24 2530, 3004.47 2530, 32 2530 M5008 2530 C3577.63 2530, 2147.25 2530, 32 2530 M32 2530 C10.67 2530, 0 2519.33, 0 2498 M32 2530 C10.67 2530, 0 2519.33, 0 2498 M0 2498 C0 1997.06, 0 1496.12, 0 32 M0 2498 C0 1534.55, 0 571.1, 0 32 M0 32 C0 10.67, 10.67 0, 32 0 M0 32 C0 10.67, 10.67 0, 32 0" stroke="#d3d3d3" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
        </path>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(6000.3768014989155 3039.800783821765) rotate(0 257.39984130859375 22.5)">
        <text x="0" y="31.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="36px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Stratejik Bilgi Elde Etmek
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(5998.296801498917 3123.800783821765) rotate(0 752.8397827148438 87)">
        <text x="0" y="20.300000000000015" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="23.200000000000017px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          * ne kadar çok bilgi var ise doğru analiz yapma ihtimali hem yüksektir hem de zor.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="49.30000000000004" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="23.200000000000017px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="78.30000000000005" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="23.200000000000017px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          * Stratejik bilgi, genel stratejik değerlendirme yanı sıra muhtemel veya devam eden çatışmaların kültürel,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="107.30000000000007" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="23.200000000000017px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          teknolojik ve coğrafi unsurlarının tamamıyla anlaşılınasını da kapsayan çok boyutlu bir değerlendirme içeren bilgidir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="136.3000000000001" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="23.200000000000017px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="165.30000000000013" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="23.200000000000017px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          * A) "Nasıl bildiğimizi" ve B) "Neyi bildiğimizi" bilmeden stratejik bilginin oluşturulması mümkün değildir.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(6016.3768014989155 3449.800783821765) rotate(0 146.29994201660156 17.5)">
        <text x="0" y="24.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          a) Bilgiye Yaklaşma
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(5928.3768014989155 3367.800783821765) rotate(0 1195.6142945662482 -0.24780115882072096)">
          <path d="M-1.18 -0.4 C397.37 -0.21, 1993.46 1.29, 2392.4 1.16 M0.41 -1.66 C398.7 -1.77, 1992.9 -0.55, 2391.46 -0.35" stroke="#b595ff" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g transform="translate(6022.692502742561 3506.800783821765) rotate(0 445.5 300)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          1- İnsanın bir şeyin doğruluğuna, doğru bilgi olduğunu sorgula-
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          madan inanmasıdır. Bu yaklaşımda insan bir şeyin doğruluğuna inan-
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="67.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          dığı için, aksine kanıtlar karşısına konulsa da fikrini değiştirmez.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="92.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Batıl inançlar gibi.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="117.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="142.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          2- Otoriteye inançtan kaynaklanır. İnsanlar, genelde değişik nedenlerle
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="167.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          otorite olarak kabul ettikleri insanların söylediklerine inanırlar.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="192.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu tür bilginin araştırma için faydası, yapılan bazı tespitlerin
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="217.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          araştırmacı tarafından araç olarak kullanılmasıdır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="242.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="267.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          3- Rasyonalist yaklaşımdır. Rasyonalist yaklaşımda düşünme ve
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="292.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          çıkarsama bilginin oluşmasına katkıda bulunur.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="317.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Mantık akıl yürütme, henüz gözlemlenmeyen şeylerle ilgili tespitler
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="342.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          yapma imkanı verir. A, B'ye neden olursa ve B de C'ye; bu A'nın C'ye
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="367.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          neden olduğu anlamına gelir. Rasyonalist yaklaşım bize, teori oluşturmamamız,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="392.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          genellemeler yapmamız imkanı verir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="417.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="442.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          4- Derinlemesine gözlemdir. Bu yöntem sistematik değildir. Bu yöntem, ancak daha
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="467.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          sistemli araştırmaya temel oluşturması için gereken gözlemlerin ve soruların
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="492.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          hazırlanmasında faydalı olur.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="517.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="542.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          5- Bilimsel yöntemdir. Bilimsel yöntemde, gözlemlerin, verilerin, malumatın
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="567.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          sistematik olarak toplanması, tasnifi ve analizi ile bilgiye ulaşılır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="592.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(7065.04346816558 3452.2769742979553) rotate(0 384.9998779296875 17.5)">
        <text x="0" y="24.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          b) Bilginin Kategorileştirmesi; Veri, Haber, Bilgi
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(6983.932357054463 3377.832529853511) rotate(0 0 391.1111111111111)">
          <path d="M0 0 C0 130.37, 0 651.85, 0 782.22 M0 0 C0 130.37, 0 651.85, 0 782.22" stroke="#b595ff" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g transform="translate(7113.192502742558 3536.1658631868445) rotate(0 506 137.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          VERİ; başka bir malumat veya bilgi ile ilişkisi olmayan, bağımsız bir
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          bilgi parçasıdır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="67.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Veriye örnek olarak bir otomobil parkındaki oto sayısı
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="92.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="117.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          HABER; bir anlam bütünlüğü sağlamak amacı ile bir araya getirilmiş verilerden oluşur.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="142.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Haber örnek olarak artan üretim maliyetlerine, araba parklarındaki azalan araba sayısına
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="167.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          ve artan işçi sayısına bakarak Opel otomobil fabrikalarının zor durumda olduğu söylenebilir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="192.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="217.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bilgi; anlamı olan, analiz edilmiş malumattır. Yukarıdaki örneklerden hareket edersek,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="242.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          "Artan işsizlik ve park yerinde daha az otomobil, Opel fabrikalarının zayıftadığı ve bunu
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="267.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          değiştirmek için halen bir şey yapmadığı anlamına gelmektedir" cümlesi bilgi içermektedir.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(8316.501152550896 2977.991260012241) rotate(0 -0.10661834344591625 1267.151012203626)">
          <path d="M-0.92 0.92 C-1.08 423.39, -1.37 2111.99, -1.18 2533.94 M0.79 0.36 C1.01 422.57, 1.12 2110.05, 0.92 2532.26" stroke="#b595ff" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(5937.398621559933 4158.705545726527) rotate(0 1190.8333333333321 0)">
          <path d="M0 0 C396.94 0, 1984.72 0, 2381.67 0 M0 0 C396.94 0, 1984.72 0, 2381.67 0" stroke="#b595ff" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g transform="translate(6025.6545795086395 4246.440670151878) rotate(0 461.8876068262134 175)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          1) Doğrudan elde edilen bilgi: Kaynağın doğası, kaynağın bilgiye
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          doğrudan erişimi, bilginin içeriğinin doğrulanabilir olmasından dolayı
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="67.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          detayların gerçeklere dayandığı düşünülen inceleme altındaki bir meselesiyle
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="92.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          ilgili bilgi.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="117.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="142.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="167.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          2) Dolaylı elde edilen bilgi: Detayların hem gerçeğe dayanma hem de
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="192.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          dayanmama ihtimali bulunan bilgi, kaynağı şüpheli güvenilirliğinin kaynağın
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="217.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          doğrudan erişiminin olmamasının ve içeriğin karmaşık karakterinin birleşimini
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="242.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          yansıtan şüpheli bilgi.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="267.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="292.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          3) Gerçek: Doğrulanmış bilgi. Farklı kaynaklar il doğrulanabilir, gerçekliği
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="317.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          kanıtlanabilir bilgi.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="342.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(8316.129498323007 4775.800857091963) rotate(0 -1194.9807608197498 0)">
          <path d="M0 0 C-398.33 0, -1991.63 0, -2389.96 0 M0 0 C-398.33 0, -1991.63 0, -2389.96 0" stroke="#b595ff" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g transform="translate(6026.697760048349 4878.634190425297) rotate(0 641 212.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Stratejik analizde karşılaştığımiz önemli bir sorunda
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          "soft-yumuşak veri" (söylentiler, düşünceler, anekdotlar, yorumlar)
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="67.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          ile "hard-sert veri"den (olgular, İstatistikler, olaylar) gelen ve bazen
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="92.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          birbirlerine bütünleştirmek zor olan malumat türleri kullanılmaktadır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="117.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="142.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Hard/sert veri-soft yumuşak veri karşılaştırmasını yaparken
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="167.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          hard/sert verilerin ölçebildiğimiz görebildiğimiz veriler olduğunu
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="192.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          bilmekteyiz.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="217.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="242.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Örneğin Güney Kıbrıs'a yerleştirilen ve Türkiye'ye yönelik olan S-300
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="267.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          füzelerini tespit ettiğimizde bunlar bizim için hard/sert veridir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="292.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Ancak bizim için bunların ne amaçla yerleştirildiğini öğrenebilmek için
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="317.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          soft veriyi yorumlamamız gerekmektedir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="342.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Türkiye'ye yönelen bu silahlarla ilgili olarak Kıbrıs Rum Kesimi ve Atina'nın
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="367.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          gerçekten ne planladığının analizini yapabilmek için Rum ve Yunan karar alıcıların
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="392.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          düşünce dünyasına girmek gerekmektedir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="417.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(8417.065026130385 3032.2922151764615) rotate(0 209 87.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Derlediğimiz bilgileri ikiye ayırırız;
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="67.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          a) Temel Bilgiler
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="92.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="117.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          b) Dinamik Bilgiler;
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="142.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="167.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(8449.772769361516 3283.0515799484774) rotate(0 130.8999481201172 35)">
        <text x="0" y="24.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          a) temel bilgiler
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="59.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(9747.541154603674 3283.051579887157) rotate(0 146.29994201660156 17.5)">
        <text x="0" y="24.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          b) dinamik bilgiler
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(8480.92764277482 3611.214328642734) rotate(0 489.5 125)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          * Elementer nitelik taşıyan, değişmeyen veya uzun vadede ve yavaş değişen.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="67.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          * Bir kez edindikten sonra, bunları ancak orta ve uzun vadede gözden geçirir;
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="92.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="117.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Örneğin, çok büyük bir yangın çıkarak ülkenin büyük
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="142.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          ormanlarını yok etmesi, bir baraj inşası sonucunda oluşan baraj gölü sonucunda
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="167.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          coğrafi durumda, değişiklik olur.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="192.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="217.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          * Her gün gelen yeni dinamik bilgiler ancak elimizdeki temel bilgilerle ilişkilendirilir
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="242.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          ise anlam kazanır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(8445.976050667214 3391.113762379764) rotate(0 166.72854043096413 93.99144347241236)">
        <path d="M32 0 C139.64 0, 247.28 0, 301.46 0 M32 0 C117.73 0, 203.46 0, 301.46 0 M301.46 0 C322.79 0, 333.46 10.67, 333.46 32 M301.46 0 C322.79 0, 333.46 10.67, 333.46 32 M333.46 32 C333.46 69.26, 333.46 106.53, 333.46 155.98 M333.46 32 C333.46 61.39, 333.46 90.78, 333.46 155.98 M333.46 155.98 C333.46 177.32, 322.79 187.98, 301.46 187.98 M333.46 155.98 C333.46 177.32, 322.79 187.98, 301.46 187.98 M301.46 187.98 C220.12 187.98, 138.79 187.98, 32 187.98 M301.46 187.98 C234.04 187.98, 166.63 187.98, 32 187.98 M32 187.98 C10.67 187.98, 0 177.32, 0 155.98 M32 187.98 C10.67 187.98, 0 177.32, 0 155.98 M0 155.98 C0 109.61, 0 63.24, 0 32 M0 155.98 C0 119.11, 0 82.23, 0 32 M0 32 C0 10.67, 10.67 0, 32 0 M0 32 C0 10.67, 10.67 0, 32 0" stroke="#56a2e8" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
        </path>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(8480.927642712231 3411.555234592185) rotate(0 131.99981689453125 70)">
        <text x="0" y="14" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          a) Bir ülkenin coğrafi durumu,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="34" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          b) Bir ülkenin nüfus yapısı,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="54" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          c) Bir halkın sosyal durumu,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="74" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          d) Bir halkın politik yapısı,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="94" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          e) Bir halkın ·eğitimi,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="114" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          f) Bir halkın dini, moral ve
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="134" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          ahlaki değerleridir
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(9747.541154915292 3448.714328562259) rotate(0 412.5 162.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          * İncelenen ülkenin potansiyel güçlerini, siyasetin gelecek ile ilgili
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          hedeflerini bulmaya yöneliktir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="67.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="92.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          * Geleceğin getireceği olanaklar ve olasılıklarla ilgilidir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="117.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="142.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          * İlgili ülkenin stratejisini yaşama geçirmek için potansiyelini
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="167.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          nasıl kullanılacağını,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="192.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Ne zaman,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="217.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Hangi yollardan ve
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="242.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Hangi etkinlik ile kullanmaya çalışacağı ile ilgilidir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="267.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="292.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          * Dinamik bilgi, betimsel niteliğe sahip olan temel bilgiden farklı olarak
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="317.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          analiz, değerlendirme, tasavvur sonucu elde edilen bilgidir.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(8381.76622160097 3257.9546809622125) rotate(0 601.5599070693661 343.4192572924733)">

        </path>
      </g>

        </path>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(6078.546164989672 5773.992382626165) rotate(0 534.5996704101562 45)">
        <text x="0" y="31.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="36px" fill="#ff9090" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          3. Aşamaya geçmeden önce okun gösterdiği bilgileri oku
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="76.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="36px" fill="#ff9090" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">

          </path>

      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">

      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g transform="translate(3793.2913405533504 9785.494256928447) rotate(0 101.19985961914062 10)">
        <text x="0" y="14" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ff8383" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          öncelikle burayı doldur
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(8141.132905547456 6277.571597840741) rotate(0 294.7995910644531 20)">
        <text x="0" y="14" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Niçin toplanacaktır?
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="34" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Hangi kavramlara, önerilere, kurallara veya teorilere varılacaktır?
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(8140.108660305845 6917.860405765687) rotate(0 373.9994812011719 30)">
        <text x="0" y="14" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Toplanacak verilerin birbiri ile ve araştırmanın bütünü ile olan ilişkilerini
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="34" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          çeşitli yönlerden inceleyip karar vermek gerekir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="54" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          İlerde kullanılır" diye gereksiz yere toplanan verilerin çoğu kez işe yaramayacaklar.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(145.5456969378938 6212.0526533331395) rotate(0 0.00004999999998744897 0.00005000000000165983)" stroke="none">
        <path fill="#b86200" d="M 6.28,-6.28 Q 6.28,-6.28 7.11,-5.11 7.95,-3.94 8.37,-2.57 8.80,-1.19 8.76,0.23 8.72,1.67 8.22,3.02 7.73,4.37 6.83,5.49 5.93,6.61 4.72,7.38 3.50,8.15 2.11,8.50 0.72,8.85 -0.71,8.73 -2.14,8.61 -3.46,8.05 -4.78,7.48 -5.85,6.52 -6.92,5.56 -7.63,4.31 -8.33,3.06 -8.60,1.65 -8.87,0.23 -8.68,-1.18 -8.49,-2.60 -7.85,-3.89 -7.21,-5.18 -6.19,-6.19 -5.18,-7.21 -3.89,-7.85 -2.60,-8.49 -1.18,-8.68 0.24,-8.87 1.65,-8.60 3.06,-8.33 4.31,-7.62 5.56,-6.92 6.52,-5.85 7.48,-4.78 8.05,-3.46 8.62,-2.14 8.73,-0.70 8.85,0.72 8.50,2.11 8.15,3.51 7.38,4.72 6.61,5.93 5.49,6.83 4.36,7.73 3.02,8.22 1.67,8.72 0.23,8.76 -1.20,8.80 -2.57,8.37 -3.94,7.95 -5.11,7.11 -6.28,6.27 -6.28,6.28 -6.28,6.28 -6.94,5.43 -7.60,4.59 -8.04,3.61 -8.48,2.64 -8.67,1.58 -8.86,0.53 -8.80,-0.53 -8.73,-1.60 -8.41,-2.62 -8.09,-3.64 -7.54,-4.56 -6.99,-5.47 -6.23,-6.23 -5.47,-6.99 -4.56,-7.54 -3.64,-8.10 -2.62,-8.41 -1.60,-8.73 -0.53,-8.80 0.53,-8.86 1.59,-8.67 2.64,-8.48 3.61,-8.04 4.59,-7.60 5.43,-6.94 6.28,-6.28 6.28,-6.28 L 6.28,-6.28 Z">
        </path>
