      <g transform="translate(267.25393748242186 6346.832073690347) rotate(0 237.599853515625 22.5)">
        <text x="0" y="31.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="36px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          ARA BİLGİLERİ İFADE EDER
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(267.2539377363905 6541.073831468124) rotate(0 485.0997009277344 22.5)">
        <text x="0" y="31.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="36px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          İLGİLİ AÇIKLAMALAR VE TEORİK BİLGİLERİ İFADE EDER
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(267.25393741893004 6708.847640991933) rotate(0 267.2998352050781 22.5)">
        <text x="0" y="31.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="36px" fill="#ff8383" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          ÖNEMLİ UYARILARI İFADE EDER
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(257.35394441893004 6193.612563991933) rotate(0 593.9996337890625 22.5)">
        <text x="0" y="31.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="36px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          ARAŞTIRMA SIRASINDA UYGUNLANMASI GEREKEN METODLAR İFADE EDER
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(8117.628271699317 7726.1690284778) rotate(0 277.1996154785156 30)">
        <text x="0" y="14" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Hangi teknikle (anket, kayıt. gözlem, yazılı belge araştırma),
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="34" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          kimler tarafından, nerede, ne zaman ve. hangi koşullar
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="54" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          altında veri toplanacağı saptanmalıdır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(9407.500500302636 7351.762291830251) rotate(0 321.1995544433589 30)">
        <text x="0" y="14" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Toplanan verilerden ne çeşitli tablolar alınacak (önceden boş tabloların
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="34" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          hazırlanması) hangi istatistiksel teknikler uygulanacak tablolar nasıl
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="54" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          hazırlanacaktır? Ne şekilde sunulacaktır?
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(9354.700573697857 6311.478026792019) rotate(0 347.5995178222656 20)">
        <text x="0" y="14" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Toplanan verileri ve değerlendirme sonuçlarını kimler, nasıl kullanabilecekler
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="34" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          ve ne şekilde elde edebileceklerdir? Bu veriler nerede ve nasıl saklanacaktır?
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(6036.8841579425725 10) rotate(0 3971 237.5)">
        <text x="0" y="332.5000000000003" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="380.00000000000034px" fill="#d3d3d3" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Sosyolojik - Bilimsel Araştırma Metodu
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(2457.6344260250544 6238.643038101763) rotate(0 109.84322079302672 0.5339908216053004)">

        </use>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(12954.136526119953 7716.7802189275935) rotate(0 1245.972911734506 22.5)">
        <text x="0" y="31.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="36px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          5- Yeterli Veri Olduğunun Kontrolü
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(15662.096171709145 5996.713759271832) rotate(0 0.6065026768901589 18423.347094612203)">

      <g transform="translate(15875.21983511189 6280.294734940603) rotate(0 746.8997802734375 52.5)">
        <text x="0" y="24.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Artık analiz aşamasına geçilebilir. Birçok belgenin anlamı yoktur. En kolay elde edilen veri bile
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="59.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="94.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          analiz edilmelidir.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(15928.019884865796 6693.818025255893) rotate(0 739.1997680664062 227.5)">
        <text x="0" y="24.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="59.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="94.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          1) Eldeki bilgiler, mevcut sorunu anlamak açısından gerektiği şekilde parçalara ayrılır;
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="129.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="164.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="199.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          2) Bilginin uygun parçaları seçilir, birbirleri ile karşılaştırılır ve yeniden yapılandırılır;
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="234.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="269.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="304.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          3) Bu aşamada parçalanan ve yeniden yapılandırılan verileri daha derinlemesine anlamaya yönelik
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="339.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          analiz teknikleri kullanılır;
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="374.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="409.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="444.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          4) Ve nihayet soruna cevap verecek unsurlar tespit edilerek cevap geliştirilir
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(15932.419909279859 6573.418031359409) rotate(0 562.099853515625 70)">
        <text x="0" y="24.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu aşamada analizci incelediği şeye değişik açılardaq bakarak temel özel-
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="59.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          liklerini anlamaya çalışmaktadır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="94.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="129.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Analizin gerçekleşmesi için ilk dört adım şöyledir:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(15875.219836037671 6471.418092394565) rotate(0 838.4000244140625 360.53325907389353)">
        <path d="M32 0 C384.83 2.48, 737.28 1.59, 1644.8 0 M32 0 C519.97 4.27, 1008.37 4.16, 1644.8 0 M1644.8 0 C1667.44 -0.49, 1677.75 12.66, 1676.8 32 M1644.8 0 C1665.31 0.58, 1676.06 12.16, 1676.8 32 M1676.8 32 C1677.12 281.05, 1677.02 530.77, 1676.8 689.07 M1676.8 32 C1675.36 173.07, 1674.93 314.73, 1676.8 689.07 M1676.8 689.07 C1676.21 711.49, 1667.46 722.31, 1644.8 721.07 M1676.8 689.07 C1674.66 709.44, 1664.21 718.78, 1644.8 721.07 M1644.8 721.07 C1078.22 719.57, 510.4 721.01, 32 721.07 M1644.8 721.07 C1138.11 724.75, 632.39 724.46, 32 721.07 M32 721.07 C9.19 719.95, -0.6 710.23, 0 689.07 M32 721.07 C10.87 722.89, 0.64 708.65, 0 689.07 M0 689.07 C-0.33 488.19, 0.43 285.98, 0 32 M0 689.07 C-0.09 540.24, -0.08 391.43, 0 32 M0 32 C-0.03 8.99, 12.43 1.3, 32 0 M0 32 C0.6 8.58, 11.73 0.83, 32 0" stroke="#b86200" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
        </path>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(16168.881624655558 7259.551342313185) rotate(0 468.03044026692714 361.1527236689585)">
        <use href="#image-6438ce5c8be2a13bccfa8d0d9b62d4ca64fd0c50" width="936" height="722" opacity="1">
        </use>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(15875.219835881097 8226.53299589896) rotate(0 908.5996704101562 17.5)">
        <text x="0" y="24.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Analiz süreci olaylardaki, hedeflerdeki değişimlere göre analiz tekniklerini, bilgi toplama yaklaşımlarını değiştirir.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(15679.724361885983 8384.733389885614) rotate(0 7169.3171237354545 -0.6315075912048087)">
          <path d="M-0.43 -0.28 C2389.23 -0.34, 11949.18 -0.85, 14339.07 -0.87 M1.54 -1.47 C2391.04 -1.36, 11949.17 -0.15, 14338.68 0.21" stroke="#b86200" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(18634.391109932858 8411.40005655228) rotate(0 -0.27495318509681965 -1202.7278740274642)">
          <path d="M0.49 0.72 C0.36 -400.11, 0.32 -2003.3, 0.1 -2404.5 M-0.71 0.06 C-1.06 -401.15, -1.19 -2005.22, -0.8 -2406.18" stroke="#39994b" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g transform="translate(18794.924333402912 6272.733420403192) rotate(0 777.6997680664062 35)">
        <text x="0" y="24.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu aşamada savunduğu görüş ile ilgili olarak isteği yapan makam "kanıtın nedir?" sorusunu soracaktır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="59.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Analizeinin bu soruya altıncı aşamayı bitirdiği zaman çok açık bir cevabı olmalıdır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(18786.39108958781 6469.933463127802) rotate(0 862.3997192382812 105)">
        <text x="0" y="24.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Analizci beklenmeyen gelişmelere götürebilecek etkili faktörleri öngörebilmelidir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="59.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bir ülkede ordunun hangi koşullarda darbe yapabileceğini öngörmek gibi.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="94.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Keza değişimin göstergelerini tanımlayabilmelidir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="129.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Olayların normal seyrinde çok radikal değişimlere neden olabilecek hadiseleri öngörmelidir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="164.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu yeteneklere sahip olan analizci bu aşamada değişik yöntemler kullanılarak farklı kaynaklardan
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="199.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          toplanan her türlü veri,malı1mat ve bilgiyi kurduğu kavramsal çerçeveye ve bu şekilde birbirlerine entegre eder.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(18631.190955310467 6944.733420403192) rotate(0 1092.1110186122078 0.1812576120486824)">
          <path d="M0.24 -0.89 C363.98 -0.65, 1818.96 0.84, 2183.08 1.01 M-1.09 1.25 C362.97 1.22, 1821.01 -0.62, 2185.31 -0.58" stroke="#39994b" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(20807.191016345623 8367.133231194208) rotate(0 0.2713644855830353 -1174.760285277427)">
          <path d="M0.74 -0.6 C0.86 -392.28, 0.96 -1959.49, 0.79 -2351.21 M-0.34 1.69 C-0.31 -389.75, 0.4 -1958.16, 0.25 -2350.1" stroke="#39994b" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g transform="translate(18781.591101794842 7191.13335326452) rotate(0 665.8736572265625 126.11997070312498)">
        <text x="0" y="29.42799316406249" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="33.63199218749999px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu noktada analiz sürecine analizeinin girdi olarak koyması gerekenleri
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="71.46798339843747" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="33.63199218749999px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          şu ana başlıklar halinde karşımıza çıkar.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="113.50797363281245" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="33.63199218749999px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="155.54796386718743" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="33.63199218749999px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          1) Sorun konusunda deneyim, bilgi ve uygun analiz teknikleri,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="197.58795410156242" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="33.63199218749999px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="239.6279443359374" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="33.63199218749999px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          2) Sorunun çözümü için uygun veri, haber ve bilgi.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(30003.990149646404 5991.1336279227235) rotate(0 0.33608452195767313 12594.394890213462)">
          <path d="M1.04 -0.77 C0.93 4197.49, 0.59 20991.39, 0.38 25189.56 M0.13 1.45 C-0.19 4199.37, -0.16 20989.91, -0.37 25187.87" stroke="#39994b" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(22925.723731189384 6823.133388868361) rotate(0 1966.0000610351562 368.0000305175781)">
        <path d="M2458.75 92.25 C2683.24 131.62, 2906.86 174.06, 3440.25 276.75 M2458.75 92.25 C2772.22 153.44, 3086.71 212.58, 3440.25 276.75 M3440.25 276.75 C3931.67 367.9, 3930.69 369.83, 3440.25 461.25 M3440.25 276.75 C3934.18 368.01, 3932.79 368.53, 3440.25 461.25 M3440.25 461.25 C3184.55 506.36, 2930 552.89, 2458.75 643.75 M3440.25 461.25 C3173.61 508.64, 2906.66 558.39, 2458.75 643.75 M2458.75 643.75 C1967.29 736.01, 1968.24 736.41, 1475.25 643.75 M2458.75 643.75 C1969.11 736.72, 1966.28 736.15, 1475.25 643.75 M1475.25 643.75 C1244.46 601.93, 1014.01 559.29, 491.75 461.25 M1475.25 643.75 C1103.13 573.06, 730.9 504.14, 491.75 461.25 M491.75 461.25 C-0.49 368.85, -0.58 369.82, 491.75 276.75 M491.75 461.25 C-1.46 369.7, -1.24 366.86, 491.75 276.75 M491.75 276.75 C772.81 224.86, 1052.78 173.37, 1475.25 92.25 M491.75 276.75 C849.64 207.86, 1207.47 140.22, 1475.25 92.25 M1475.25 92.25 C1967.72 -1.45, 1966.74 1.7, 2458.75 92.25 M1475.25 92.25 C1965.81 1.71, 1965.05 -2.23, 2458.75 92.25" stroke="#ff8383" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
        </path>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(23994.72397533001 7126.132656446486) rotate(0 940.4996686662962 95.00000000000011)">
        <text x="0" y="66.50000000000009" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="76.0000000000001px" fill="#ff8383" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          BU AŞAMADAN SONRA RAPOR GÖZDEN GEÇİRİLECEKTİR
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="161.50000000000023" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="76.0000000000001px" fill="#ff8383" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(16137.72446361126 8543.133261711784) rotate(0 370.213134765625 49.499969482421875)">
        <text x="0" y="69.29995727539062" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="79.199951171875px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          ANALİZ MİSYONLARI
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(16115.72495189251 13009.13301757116) rotate(0 939.8388398040934 133.50021362304642)">
        <text x="0" y="186.90029907226537" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="213.60034179687472px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          ANALİZ METODLARI
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(22541.203629962827 14211.151730970576) rotate(0 759.2196605919962 101.500244140625)">
        <text x="0" y="142.10034179687557" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="162.40039062500065px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Kognitif Metodlar
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(15787.723954984958 8765.800040276239) rotate(0 1070.6667582194013 474.6666717529297)">
        <path d="M32 0 C586.97 3.07, 1141.4 2.76, 2109.33 0 M32 0 C709.08 -3.57, 1386.09 -3.85, 2109.33 0 M2109.33 0 C2130.23 -1.13, 2142.13 11.44, 2141.33 32 M2109.33 0 C2129.52 0.88, 2139.2 8.4, 2141.33 32 M2141.33 32 C2139.53 378.61, 2139.68 724.26, 2141.33 917.33 M2141.33 32 C2139.51 253.89, 2139.17 476.17, 2141.33 917.33 M2141.33 917.33 C2141.22 938.99, 2129.4 948.51, 2109.33 949.33 M2141.33 917.33 C2142.16 939.24, 2130.67 948.92, 2109.33 949.33 M2109.33 949.33 C1521.38 946.42, 933.48 946.5, 32 949.33 M2109.33 949.33 C1364.29 944.53, 619.1 944.85, 32 949.33 M32 949.33 C8.97 949.27, -1.57 937.42, 0 917.33 M32 949.33 C11.73 951.03, -0.08 940.82, 0 917.33 M0 917.33 C2.29 664.94, 1.96 413.13, 0 32 M0 917.33 C-0.73 674.21, -1.12 431.4, 0 32 M0 32 C-1.2 10.79, 10.56 1.27, 32 0 M0 32 C-1.24 12.46, 10.33 -0.66, 32 0" stroke="#b86200" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
        </path>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(15910.390682686782 8936.46669677038) rotate(0 569.7615356445312 277.49999999999955)">
        <text x="0" y="43.16666666666661" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="49.33333333333327px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          a) Özel malı1mat misyonu,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="104.8333333333332" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="49.33333333333327px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="166.49999999999977" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="49.33333333333327px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          b) Modern öngörücü sosyal bilim misyonu,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="228.16666666666637" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="49.33333333333327px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="289.833333333333" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="49.33333333333327px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          c) Geleneksel Amerikan analiz misyonu ve
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="351.49999999999955" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="49.33333333333327px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="413.1666666666662" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="49.33333333333327px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          d) Operasyonel Amerikan analiz misyonudur.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="474.83333333333275" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="49.33333333333327px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="536.4999999999993" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="49.33333333333327px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(15887.723853259697 9444.466676425327) rotate(0 962.4251692325242 96.49988810221362)">
        <text x="0" y="45.03328111436635" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="51.466606987847264px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Özel malı1mat misyonu ile modern öngörücü sosyal bilim misyonu
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="109.36653984917544" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="51.466606987847264px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          iki aşırı ucu temsil ederken, geleneksel Amerikan analiz misyonu ile
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="173.69979858398452" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="51.466606987847264px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          operasyonel Amerikan analiz misyonu orta noktayı temsil ederler.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(15905.590867826748 9865.400204053909) rotate(0 1125.266601562499 208.1969891172464)">
        <text x="0" y="41.6393978234493" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="47.5878832267992px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          a) Özel Malômat Misyonu:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="101.12425185694829" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="47.5878832267992px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="160.6091058904473" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="47.5878832267992px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Analizeinin görevi gizlice toplanan bilgilerin karar alıcılara iletilmesidir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="220.09395992394627" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="47.5878832267992px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Burada analizci, bilginin sadece teknik anlamda yorumcusudur.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="279.5788139574453" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="47.5878832267992px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Örneğin, elde edilen bir düşman dinlemesinin deşifre edilmesi gibi.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="339.0636679909443" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="47.5878832267992px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Ancak bu şekilde elde edilen bilgiden sonuç çıkarma işi karar alıcılara bırakılmıştır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="398.5485220244433" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="47.5878832267992px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(15910.390682756431 10499.076635375524) rotate(0 940.53271484375 161.9444105360244)">
        <text x="0" y="45.34443495008687" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="51.82221137152786px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          b) Modern Öngörücü Sosyal Bilim Misyonu:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="110.12219916449669" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="51.82221137152786px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="174.8999633789065" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="51.82221137152786px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Analizeinin yasal karar alıcıya sadece neyin olacağını değil,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="239.67772759331632" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="51.82221137152786px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          niçin olacağını ve daha sonra neyin olmasının muhtemel olduğunu
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="304.4554918077261" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="51.82221137152786px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          söylediği bu yöntemde sosyal bilim metodolijisinden faydalanılır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(15910.390682598882 11071.677408375523) rotate(0 1164.5419921875 249.12819886818897)">
        <text x="0" y="43.59743480193305" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="49.82563977363777px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          c) Geleneksel Amerikan Misyonu:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="105.87948451898026" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="49.82563977363777px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="168.16153423602748" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="49.82563977363777px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Modern Öngörücü Sosyal Bilim Misyonu (MÖSBM) ile uyuşan birçok
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="230.44358395307466" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="49.82563977363777px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          yönü vardır. Analizcinin siyasal taratlara eşit uzaklıktabulunmalarını gerekir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="292.72563367012185" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="49.82563977363777px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="355.0076833871691" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="49.82563977363777px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Analizci politikacının kurmay heyetinin parçası olmamalıdır. Politikacının arzularını
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="417.2897331042163" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="49.82563977363777px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          ve genel politik eğilimi aniayacak kadar politikaya yakın olmalı, ama politikleşmeye-
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="479.5717828212635" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="49.82563977363777px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          cek kadar da uzak kalmalıdır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(15887.723853732994 11885.661390340367) rotate(0 1380.3677978515625 285.23077549078516)">
        <text x="0" y="49.91538571088742" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="57.04615509815705px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          d) Operasyonel Amerikan Analiz Misyonu:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="121.22307958358374" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="57.04615509815705px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="192.53077345628006" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="57.04615509815705px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          "fırsat analizi" veya "dava edilebilir istihbarat" da
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="263.8384673289764" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="57.04615509815705px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          denilmektedir. Bu yöntem karar alıcılar tarafından gösterilecek politik
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="335.1461612016727" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="57.04615509815705px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          hedeflere ulaşma imkanını artırmak için geliştirilmiştir. Ampirik ve tanımsal analizler
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="406.453855074369" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="57.04615509815705px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          faydalı olmak ile birlikte analizin temel odağı değildir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="477.7615489470653" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="57.04615509815705px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Temel amaç diğer ülke ve lider toplumların zayıfyanlarını ve oluşturdukları tehditleri
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="549.0692428197617" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="57.04615509815705px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          tanımlayarak, bunlardan istifade edebilmenin yollarını aramaktır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(18525.59096955201 8765.80004039896) rotate(0 1300 916.0003662109375)">
        <path d="M32 0 C738.04 0.3, 1444.26 -0.02, 2568 0 M32 0 C674.49 -0.03, 1316.51 -0.26, 2568 0 M2568 0 C2590.68 -0.25, 2599.11 11.37, 2600 32 M2568 0 C2590.17 -0.53, 2601.28 11.55, 2600 32 M2600 32 C2598.75 512.64, 2598.92 991.7, 2600 1800 M2600 32 C2605.35 413.26, 2605.6 795.18, 2600 1800 M2600 1800 C2601.12 1822.55, 2589.38 1830.12, 2568 1832 M2600 1800 C2601.69 1823.55, 2590.14 1832.39, 2568 1832 M2568 1832 C1799.14 1838.05, 1031.52 1837.79, 32 1832 M2568 1832 C1705.98 1826.59, 843.75 1827.21, 32 1832 M32 1832 C8.78 1832, -0.35 1820.15, 0 1800 M32 1832 C8.48 1833.86, -0.63 1822.54, 0 1800 M0 1800 C4.55 1317.89, 4.33 835.38, 0 32 M0 1800 C1.38 1181.44, 1.25 562.57, 0 32 M0 32 C0.56 8.87, 10.39 1.9, 32 0 M0 32 C-1.4 12.94, 11.42 2.08, 32 0" stroke="#56a2e8" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
        </path>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(18669.590755928963 9089.800093804723) rotate(0 1016.3997802734375 122.5)">
        <text x="0" y="24.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Analiz misyonu, istihbarat analizinin niçin yapıldığını, amacının ne olduğunu belirleyen yaklaşımsal ya da felsefi çerçevedir. Yani:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="59.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="94.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Analiz hangi zihniyetle, hangi rolü üstlenerek, hangi amaca hizmet ederek yapılacak?
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="129.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="164.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Analizcinin görevi sadece bilgi aktarmak mı, yoksa geleceği öngörmek mi?
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="199.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="234.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Karar alıcıyı yönlendirecek mi, yoksa sadece destekleyecek mi?
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(19314.870913104744 8890.800116951696) rotate(0 522.7198733956157 99.00001525878906)">
        <text x="0" y="69.30001068115243" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="79.20001220703134px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Analiz Misyonu Ne Demek?
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="168.3000259399416" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="79.20001220703134px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(18662.73633565748 9454.900161986852) rotate(0 1162.8546339181758 410.50004196167015)">
        <use href="#image-eb1dbccc8a05dcec2df37478bd1d276e0005f85a" width="2326" height="821" opacity="1">
        </use>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(16892.150733142513 8609.187241670326) rotate(0 1198.0543963072178 173.9539950304329)">
          <path d="M-0.96 -0.76 C398.06 57.25, 1995.38 290.36, 2394.73 348.66 M0.73 1.46 C400.1 59.04, 1998.16 289.15, 2397.07 346.77" stroke="#56a2e8" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
        <g transform="translate(16892.150733142513 8609.187241670326) rotate(0 1198.0543963072178 173.9539950304329)">
          <path d="M2372.6 351.88 C2379.83 349.11, 2390.33 347.99, 2397.07 346.77 M2372.6 351.88 C2381.33 349.62, 2391.33 348.43, 2397.07 346.77" stroke="#56a2e8" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
        <g transform="translate(16892.150733142513 8609.187241670326) rotate(0 1198.0543963072178 173.9539950304329)">
          <path d="M2375.04 334.95 C2381.51 338.06, 2391.16 342.83, 2397.07 346.77 M2375.04 334.95 C2382.89 338.94, 2391.99 344, 2397.07 346.77" stroke="#56a2e8" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(15675.59096955201 12783.400438022007) rotate(0 7152.070724908211 0.37731930042809836)">
          <path d="M0.84 -0.61 C2384.72 -0.62, 11920.49 -1.08, 14304.32 -0.91 M-0.17 1.68 C2383.48 1.88, 11919.69 0.72, 14303.53 0.15" stroke="#39994b" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(21523.59115265748 8375.400254916538) rotate(0 0.18820668573061994 2204.265402033604)">
          <path d="M1.07 0.76 C1.02 735.3, 0.44 3673.91, 0.17 4408.41 M0.17 0.12 C-0.06 734.79, -0.4 3671.69, -0.69 4406.51" stroke="#39994b" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g transform="translate(21730.124345838467 8658.176717802606) rotate(0 1445.350341796875 182.5000762939453)">
        <text x="0" y="85.16670227050777" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="97.33337402343746px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Analizde iki tür analiz karşımıza çıkmaktadır. Bunlar;
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="206.83341979980457" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="97.33337402343746px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          a) Veri-bağımlı (Kanıt-bağımlı) arializ,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="328.5001373291014" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="97.33337402343746px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          b) Kavram bağımlı (Hipotez-bağımlı) analizdir.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(26172.125688400967 8568.782600661982) rotate(0 1231.224365234375 121.66671752929688)">
        <text x="0" y="85.16670227050777" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="97.33337402343746px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="206.83341979980457" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="97.33337402343746px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          b) Kavram bağımlı (Hipotez-bağımlı) analizdir.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(25926.25798208456 12788.733588249872) rotate(0 0.23301216327308794 -1912.2335619922212)">
          <path d="M-0.7 -0.14 C-0.48 -637.28, 0.71 -3185.39, 1 -3822.82 M1.14 -1.26 C1.31 -638.7, 0.63 -3187.23, 0.58 -3824.33" stroke="#39994b" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g transform="translate(21738.124528908775 9327.36207176745) rotate(0 752.6959981461823 74.37710439367083)">
        <text x="0" y="104.12794615113918" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="119.00336702987336px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          a) Veri Bağımlı Analiz:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(21760.83409985881 9760.851198333768) rotate(0 1613.9418912896126 145.29350793440722)">
        <text x="0" y="50.85272777704249" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="58.117403173762845px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu tip analizde, doğruluk öncelikle eldeki verilerin doğruluğuna ve tamlığına bağlıdır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="123.49948174424604" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="58.117403173762845px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bir askeri birliğin savaşa hazır olup olmadığının analizi veri-bağımlı bir analizdir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="196.1462357114496" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="58.117403173762845px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Ancak aşırı bir şekilde veri bağımlı hale gelen analizeinin de doğru analizin önüne set çekebileceği
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="268.79298967865316" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="58.117403173762845px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          göz önünde tutulmalıdır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(26108.25769725383 9043.39985310176) rotate(0 1846.4003732777 112.66677856445312)">
        <text x="0" y="39.433372497558615" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.06671142578127px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Kavram bağımlı analiz, elinizde çok az somut bilgi olduğu durumlarda yapılan bir analiz türüdür. Burada analizci; az veriyle, çok sayıda bilinmez ve
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="95.76676177978521" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.06671142578127px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          belirsizlik içinde, zihinsel modeller, deneyim ve sezgilerini kullanarak anlam çıkarır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="152.1001510620118" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.06671142578127px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="208.4335403442384" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.06671142578127px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu analiz türü; net sorulara değil, belirsiz ve karmaşık sorulara cevap arar. Elinizde tam bilgi yoktur ama yine de bir yargıya varmanız gerekir.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(26155.59107137948 10099.399913791865) rotate(0 886.0537716840608 732.3589031512922)">
        <text x="0" y="36.61794515756462" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="88.92929538265693" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="141.24064560774926" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Riskleri ve Önlemler
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="193.55199583284156" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu analiz türü yanıltıcı olabilir, çünkü az veriyle büyük çıkarımlar yapılır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="245.86334605793388" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="298.1746962830262" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu yüzden şu önlemler alınmalıdır:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="350.48604650811853" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="402.79739673321086" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Mantıksal bütünlük olmalı.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="455.1087469583032" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="507.4200971833955" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Açık ve net ifade edilmeli.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="559.7314474084877" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="612.0427976335801" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Gerçekçi olmalı.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="664.3541478586724" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="716.6654980837648" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Alternatif bakış açıları düşünülmeli.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="768.976848308857" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="821.2881985339494" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Ne Zaman Kullanılır?
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="873.5995487590417" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Veri toplamak zor ya da yavaş olduğunda.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="925.910898984134" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="978.2222492092263" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Hedef belirsiz ama stratejik kararlar gerekiyorsa.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1030.5335994343186" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1082.844949659411" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Uzun vadeli düşünmek, senaryo oluşturmak istendiğinde.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1135.1562998845034" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1187.4676501095958" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Sonuç:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1239.7790003346881" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Kavram bağımlı analiz, belirsizlik ortamında karar vermek için kullanılan,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1292.0903505597803" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          teorik çerçevelerle değil, daha çok deneyim,,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1344.4017007848727" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          sezgi ve zihinsel modellemeyle yürütülen bir analiz türüdür. Ancak dikkatli
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1396.713051009965" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          uygulanmadığında yanıltıcı sonuçlara da götürebilir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1449.0244012350572" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="41.849080180073855px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu nedenle analitik titizlik ve yöntemsel denetim şarttır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(26155.59107127729 9358.067008049678) rotate(0 875.3798326182932 346.000061035156)">
        <text x="0" y="40.36667378743489" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="46.13334147135416px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Özellikleri:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="98.0333506266276" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="46.13334147135416px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Veri azdır ya da eksiktir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="155.70002746582028" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="46.13334147135416px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="213.366704305013" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="46.13334147135416px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Teori ya da model net değildir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="271.0333811442057" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="46.13334147135416px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="328.7000579833984" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="46.13334147135416px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Analizci sezgilerini, deneyimlerini ve zihinsel çerçevesini kullanır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="386.36673482259107" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="46.13334147135416px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="444.03341166178376" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="46.13334147135416px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Farklı analizciler aynı verilerle farklı sonuçlara ulaşabilir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="501.70008850097645" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="46.13334147135416px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="559.3667653401692" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="46.13334147135416px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Hipotez üretmek ve olasılıkları değerlendirmek için kullanılır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="617.0334421793619" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="46.13334147135416px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="674.7001190185546" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="46.13334147135416px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Doğrudan kanıt değil, bağlam ve anlam yaratmak amaçlanır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(28167.924470732036 10505.06677408158) rotate(0 908.9407979713669 1061.7415922338319)">
        <text x="0" y="40.17400619263152" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Örnek Durum:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="97.56544361067657" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bir ülkede birden fazla terör saldırısı oluyor ama
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="154.9568810287216" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          failler bilinmiyor, istihbarat sınırlı.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="212.34831844676665" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="269.7397558648117" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Veriler:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="327.1311932828567" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="384.52263070090174" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Saldırılar aynı şehirde gerçekleşiyor.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="441.9140681189468" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="499.3055055369918" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Hedef alınan yerler devlet binaları.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="556.6969429550369" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="614.0883803730819" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Saldırı sonrası hiç üstlenme olmuyor.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="671.479817791127" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="728.871255209172" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Sosyal medyada bir grubun adının geçtiği konuşuluyor ama kanıt yok.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="786.262692627217" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="843.654130045262" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Kavram Bağımlı Analiz Nasıl Uygulanır?
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="901.0455674633071" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="958.4370048813521" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Soru: Bu saldırılar organize bir grubun işi mi?
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1015.8284422993971" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1073.2198797174424" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Analizci, şu soruları kendine sorar:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1130.6113171354873" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1188.0027545535324" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu tür saldırılardan kimin çıkarı olabilir?
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1245.3941919715774" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1302.7856293896225" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Daha önce benzer saldırılarda kimler vardı?
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1360.1770668076674" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1417.5685042257126" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Eylem biçimi kime benziyor?
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1474.9599416437575" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1532.3513790618026" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Sosyal medya bilgileri ne anlatıyor? Gerçek mi, algı mı?
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1589.7428164798475" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1647.1342538978927" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Devletin bu gruplarla geçmişte yaşadığı gerilimler nelerdi?
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1704.5256913159376" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1761.9171287339827" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu soruların ışığında analizci, verisi az da olsa bir çerçeve oluşturur:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1819.3085661520277" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1876.7000035700728" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          “X grubu bu saldırılardan fayda sağlayabilir. Eylem tarzı
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1934.091440988118" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          da geçmiş eylemleriyle benzeşiyor.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1991.4828784061629" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Eldeki veriler yetersiz ama bu grubun bağlantısı
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="2048.8743158242078" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          olma ihtimali yüksektir.”
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="2106.265753242253" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="45.91314993443603px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(26164.740150471505 11665.859980714067) rotate(0 1248.3646726506486 475.20844459533737)">
        <text x="0" y="36.960656801859564" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="42.240750630696645px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Örnek Konu: Uyuşturucu Kaçakçılığı
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="89.76159509023037" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="42.240750630696645px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Kavram bağımlı analiz yapan biri şu sorularla ilerler:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="142.5625333786012" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="42.240750630696645px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="195.36347166697198" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="42.240750630696645px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Hangi kavramlar önemli? → Uyuşturucu türleri, kaynak ülkeler,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="248.1644099553428" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="42.240750630696645px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          dağıtım şekli, para akışı, tutuklamalar vs.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="300.9653482437136" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="42.240750630696645px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="353.7662865320844" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="42.240750630696645px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu kavramlar nasıl birbirine bağlı?
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="406.56722482045524" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="42.240750630696645px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="459.368163108826" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="42.240750630696645px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Hangi noktalar eksik?
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="512.1691013971969" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="42.240750630696645px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="564.9700396855677" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="42.240750630696645px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Alternatif açıklamalar neler olabilir?
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="617.7709779739386" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="42.240750630696645px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="670.5719162623093" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="42.240750630696645px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          “Ne olursa şu olur?” → “Ne-eğer” düşünme
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="723.3728545506801" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="42.240750630696645px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="776.173792839051" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="42.240750630696645px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          “Eğer bu doğruysa, o zaman ne olur?” → “Öyleyse-ne” düşünme
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="828.9747311274217" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="42.240750630696645px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="881.7756694157925" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="42.240750630696645px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu sorularla bir analiz şeması çıkarır, eksikleri görür ve
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="934.5766077041634" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="42.240750630696645px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          odaklanılacak noktaları belirler.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(16120.749055546803 13712.242776529418) rotate(0 1207.9620705762918 146.4268721004887)">
        <text x="0" y="51.24940523517111" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="58.570748840195556px" fill="#ff8383" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Stratejik analizeinin amacı rakibin ıihnini çöıümlemektir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="124.46284128541555" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="58.570748840195556px" fill="#ff8383" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Rakibin ziihnini çözümlemek ise ne düşündüğünü anlamaktan geçer.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="197.67627733566" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="58.570748840195556px" fill="#ff8383" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Eğer rakibin nasıl düşündüğü çözülmüş ise ne düşündüğünü bulmak kolaylaşır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="270.88971338590443" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="58.570748840195556px" fill="#ff8383" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Aksi halde rakibin ne düşündüğü tekrar ve tekrar bulunması gerekmektedir.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(16100.11739821322 14105.96196378777) rotate(0 1321.4019427365365 29.44300823814865)">
        <text x="0" y="41.22021153340782" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="47.108813181037505px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Analizde literatür tahlil zeminleri "nasıl" araçları ve kognitif süreç ve metodları diye ikiye ayrılır
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(15984.924224048293 13586.733593336137) rotate(0 1516.420911276431 391.99981689453125)">
        <path d="M32 0 C678.85 -7.46, 1327.2 -7.88, 3000.84 0 M32 0 C1047.67 9.9, 2063.44 10.06, 3000.84 0 M3000.84 0 C3021.69 -1.92, 3031.48 9.56, 3032.84 32 M3000.84 0 C3022.02 -0.99, 3032.39 11.46, 3032.84 32 M3032.84 32 C3032.1 203.01, 3031.83 374.26, 3032.84 752 M3032.84 32 C3030.8 234.2, 3031.12 436.54, 3032.84 752 M3032.84 752 C3031.58 773.54, 3021.28 784.67, 3000.84 784 M3032.84 752 C3030.97 772.22, 3022.3 785.87, 3000.84 784 M3000.84 784 C2240.04 795.03, 1479.88 795, 32 784 M3000.84 784 C2254.61 785.5, 1509.28 785.38, 32 784 M32 784 C11.43 782.84, -1.14 775.06, 0 752 M32 784 C9.17 782.62, 1.46 771.72, 0 752 M0 752 C2.37 479.86, 1.92 209.46, 0 32 M0 752 C1.41 471.02, 1.43 189.17, 0 32 M0 32 C-0.83 12.01, 12.49 1.69, 32 0 M0 32 C-0.15 12.48, 12.93 1.76, 32 0" stroke="#39994b" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
        </path>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(22015.37798194669 14662.780936748248) rotate(0 1514.8796959138563 170.02021037824125)">
        <text x="1514.8796959138556" y="59.507073632384326" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="68.00808415129637px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu metodların kullanımı ile rakibin düşünce yapısına sızma hedeflenmektedir.
        </text>
        <text x="1514.8796959138556" y="144.51717882150479" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="68.00808415129637px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu medatların temelinde yaratıcı düşünce ve onun sürekli canlı tutulması vardır.
        </text>
        <text x="1514.8796959138556" y="229.52728401062527" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="68.00808415129637px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Analizci sürekli yeni sorular sormalı, yeni bağlantılar oluşturmalı, yeni
        </text>
