        <text x="1514.8796959138556" y="314.53738919974575" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="68.00808415129637px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          analitik yaklaşımlar peşinde olmalıdır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(22015.377982224018 15173.998158000626) rotate(0 1568.5525158868331 79.22723899930133)">
        <text x="1568.5525158868325" y="55.45906729951075" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="63.381791199440855px" fill="#ff8383" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bir fikrin ortaya çıktığı yaratıcı düşünme aşaması ile, o fikrin mantıklı olup olmadığını
        </text>
        <text x="1568.5525158868325" y="134.68630629881181" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="63.381791199440855px" fill="#ff8383" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          değerlendirdiğimiz eleştirel düşünme aşaması birbirinden ayrı tutulmalıdır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(22541.203629179916 15503.629437073425) rotate(0 988.9077887792009 48.86632011738493)">
        <text x="988.907788779201" y="68.41284816433848" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="78.18611218781541px" fill="#ff8383" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          "Önce özgürce üret, sonra mantıklı olanı seç."
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(22015.377981605583 15840.199936854671) rotate(0 1489.297445501068 43.966974015299456)">
        <text x="1489.2974455010678" y="61.553763621419776" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="70.34715842447974px" fill="#ff8383" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Yani ne kadar çok fikir üretilirse onlar arasından seçmek o kadar kolay olur.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(16154.124126324496 16878.209698876173) rotate(0 3284.060546875001 904.7620210193454)">
        <text x="0" y="79.16667683919273" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="90.47620210193455px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="192.26192946661092" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="90.47620210193455px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="305.3571820940291" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="90.47620210193455px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Sonuçtan Başla:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="418.4524347214473" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="90.47620210193455px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Olayın olmuş olduğunu varsay (örneğin: Suudi monarşisinin çökmesi).
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="531.5476873488655" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="90.47620210193455px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="644.6429399762836" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="90.47620210193455px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Zamana Geri Git:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="757.7381926037018" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="90.47620210193455px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu olayın gerçekleşmesine yol açan gelişmelerin neler olabileceğini geçmişe doğru sorgula (6 ay veya 1 yıl önce ne olmuş olabilir?).
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="870.83344523112" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="90.47620210193455px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="983.9286978585382" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="90.47620210193455px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          "Oldu mu?" Değil, "Nasıl Oldu?" diye Sor:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1097.0239504859562" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="90.47620210193455px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Analiz odağını olayın gerçekleşip gerçekleşmediğinden ziyade, nasıl gerçekleşmiş olabileceğine yönlendir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1210.1192031133744" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="90.47620210193455px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1323.2144557407926" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="90.47620210193455px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Zihni Geleceğe Taşı:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1436.3097083682107" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="90.47620210193455px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu teknik analizcinin bugüne takılı kalmasını engeller, daha geniş bir perspektif sunar.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1549.404960995629" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="90.47620210193455px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1662.500213623047" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="90.47620210193455px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1775.5954662504653" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="90.47620210193455px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(16052.790356148711 16402.733944288284) rotate(0 1455.3006958003552 73.50006103515625)">
        <text x="0" y="102.9000854492187" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.60009765624993px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          a) Geriye Doğru Düşünme Tekniği (Backcasting)
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(24066.123028394806 16476.23400521797) rotate(0 485.0999450683594 73.50006103515625)">
        <text x="0" y="102.9000854492187" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.60009765624993px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          b) Kristal Top:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(16154.124126078397 16680.209668665237) rotate(0 2995.1730899917256 99.00001525878906)">
        <text x="0" y="69.3000106811524" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="79.2000122070313px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Tanım:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="168.30002593994152" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="79.2000122070313px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Beklenmedik bir olayın gerçekleşmiş olduğunu varsayarak, geçmişe dönük bir şekilde bu olayın nasıl meydana geldiğini kurgulama yöntemidir
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(16154.124126900664 18913.92424670886) rotate(0 2300.755921457496 41.49993896484375)">
        <text x="0" y="58.09991455078126" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="66.39990234375001px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Not: Bu teknik, analizcinin önceden imkânsız gibi gördüğü senaryolara dair yaratıcı ve mantıklı açıklamalar üretmesini sağlar.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(16154.12412665457 18465.400366919795) rotate(0 1846.8993181501155 172.5)">
        <text x="0" y="80.50000000000016" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="92.00000000000018px" fill="#ff8383" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Olasılığı Düşük Ama Etkisi Yüksek Senaryolar İçin Kullan:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="195.5000000000004" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="92.00000000000018px" fill="#ff8383" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Özellikle düşük ihtimalli ama yüksek etkili olayları anlamada yararlıdır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="310.5000000000006" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="92.00000000000018px" fill="#ff8383" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(15954.124432076445 16291.400427849483) rotate(0 3519.999542236328 1616.0002136230469)">
        <path d="M32 0 C1966.18 17.27, 3900.69 17.71, 7008 0 M32 0 C1677.74 -13.93, 3322.51 -13.9, 7008 0 M7008 0 C7027.92 -1.34, 7040.96 12.43, 7040 32 M7008 0 C7031.22 -0.13, 7039.98 10.62, 7040 32 M7040 32 C7044.27 779.15, 7043.53 1525.76, 7040 3200 M7040 32 C7043.57 739.65, 7043.64 1447.55, 7040 3200 M7040 3200 C7041.09 3221.75, 7030.02 3233.77, 7008 3232 M7040 3200 C7040.27 3222.99, 7027.64 3233.45, 7008 3232 M7008 3232 C5261.69 3253.79, 3513.81 3253.1, 32 3232 M7008 3232 C5099.86 3228, 3192.17 3228.28, 32 3232 M32 3232 C8.84 3232.66, 1.5 3219.91, 0 3200 M32 3232 C12.06 3233.62, 1.53 3221.53, 0 3200 M0 3200 C5.66 2287.13, 4.96 1374.56, 0 32 M0 3200 C9.72 2355.19, 9.36 1510.92, 0 32 M0 32 C1.09 12.56, 12.57 -1.2, 32 0 M0 32 C1.86 9.83, 9.77 2.01, 32 0" stroke="#b86200" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
        </path>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(24066.123028689726 17021.40042788464) rotate(0 1804.0727762082624 505.5000305175781)">
        <text x="0" y="78.63333808051217" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="89.86667209201391px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Kristal top yaklaşımı da geriye doğru düşünme
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="190.96667819552957" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="89.86667209201391px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          tekniği gibi çalışır. Örneğin; çok güvenilir bir kaynak bir bilgi vererek
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="303.300018310547" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="89.86667209201391px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="415.6333584255643" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="89.86667209201391px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          analizeinin bir konu ile ilgili beklentisinin yanlış olduğunu ortaya ko-
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="527.9666985405818" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="89.86667209201391px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          yuyor. Analizci bu durumda kendi beklentisinin yanlışlığını ve gelen
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="640.3000386555991" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="89.86667209201391px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="752.6333787706166" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="89.86667209201391px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          haberin doğruluğunu ispat eden bir senaryo geliştirecektir. Eğer böyle
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="864.966718885634" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="89.86667209201391px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          bir senaryoyu akla uygun şekilde geliştirirse, ilk beklentisinin yanlış
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="977.3000590006513" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="89.86667209201391px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          olabileceği ortaya çıkacaktır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(23506.123638619414 16243.400549919796) rotate(0 2792.0004272460938 1664.0000915527344)">
        <path d="M32 0 C1954.6 4.89, 3878.28 5.23, 5552 0 M32 0 C1417.41 -9.42, 2803.56 -9.52, 5552 0 M5552 0 C5574.76 0.21, 5582.05 11.82, 5584 32 M5552 0 C5571.19 -1.98, 5586.25 10.06, 5584 32 M5584 32 C5572.02 916.73, 5570.74 1800.2, 5584 3296 M5584 32 C5578.1 982.49, 5577.98 1932.69, 5584 3296 M5584 3296 C5583.54 3317.48, 5573.68 3328.98, 5552 3328 M5584 3296 C5584.26 3317.28, 5572.93 3326.97, 5552 3328 M5552 3328 C3345.72 3342.64, 1139.45 3341.2, 32 3328 M5552 3328 C3915.51 3325.71, 2277.97 3325.17, 32 3328 M32 3328 C11.85 3326.65, -0.33 3318.91, 0 3296 M32 3328 C10.53 3327.6, 0.33 3316.55, 0 3296 M0 3296 C13.14 2405.93, 12.47 1516.25, 0 32 M0 3296 C12.94 2168.64, 12.53 1040.82, 0 32 M0 32 C0.28 9.85, 10.61 -0.23, 32 0 M0 32 C-1.92 11.01, 12.51 2.17, 32 0" stroke="#b86200" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
        </path>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(16052.79035704129 19853.945936708857) rotate(0 1168.2825927734375 151.72727642637346)">
        <text x="0" y="106.20909349846147" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="121.38182114109881px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          c) Rol Yapma Tekniği (Role-Playing)
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="257.936369924835" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="121.38182114109881px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(16052.79035704129 25252.333821708853) rotate(0 1168.2825927734375 151.72727642637437)">
        <text x="0" y="106.20909349846147" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="121.38182114109881px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          c) Rol Yapma Tekniği (Role-Playing)
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="257.936369924835" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="121.38182114109881px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(23630.79115049832 19855.94605877917) rotate(0 1635.5955810546875 75.86363821318719)">
        <text x="0" y="106.20909349846147" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="121.38182114109881px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          d) Şeytanın Avukatlığı Tekniği (Devil’s Advocacy)
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(16154.124126619416 20258.900732884642) rotate(0 2730.6424061794305 107.0001220703125)">
        <text x="0" y="74.90008544921857" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="85.60009765624979px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Tanım:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="181.9002075195308" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="85.60009765624979px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Analizcinin kendi kimliğinden sıyrılarak başka bir kişinin yerine geçip, onun bakış açısıyla düşünmeye çalışmasıdır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(16154.124126900664 23227.400183744016) rotate(0 3223.436450893606 110.99990844726562)">
        <text x="0" y="77.69993591308629" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="88.79992675781291px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Not:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="188.69984436035242" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="88.79992675781291px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu yöntem kesin cevaplar vermese bile, yeni ve özgün bakış açıları üretmeyi sağlar. Zihinleri özgürleştirir ve yaratıcılığı artırır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(16154.124126338163 20728.400854919797) rotate(0 3331.2391106633077 1071.9999694824219)">
        <text x="0" y="93.79999732971203" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="107.19999694824232px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Uygulama Adımları:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="227.79999351501493" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="107.19999694824232px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="361.79998970031784" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="107.19999694824232px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Kimlik Değiştir:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="495.79998588562074" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="107.19999694824232px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Kendi düşünce tarzını ve varsayımlarını bir kenara bırak; hedef kişi (örneğin: bir lider) gibi düşün ve hisset.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="629.7999820709236" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="107.19999694824232px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="763.7999782562266" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="107.19999694824232px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Sadece Gözlem Değil, Bizzat Rol:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="897.7999744415295" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="107.19999694824232px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bir ülkenin ne yapacağını tahmin etmek değil, o ülkenin karar vericisi gibi davranmak esastır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1031.7999706268324" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="107.19999694824232px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1165.7999668121352" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="107.19999694824232px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Önyargılardan Kurtul:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1299.7999629974383" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="107.19999694824232px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu yöntem, analizcinin alışılmış düşünce kalıplarından sıyrılmasını sağlar.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1433.799959182741" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="107.19999694824232px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1567.7999553680438" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="107.19999694824232px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Tek Başına Zor, Grupla Etkili:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1701.799951553347" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="107.19999694824232px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Birden fazla analizcinin farklı rollere girmesi, etkileşimi artırır. Bu, bir tür doğal simülasyon ortamı yaratır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1835.7999477386497" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="107.19999694824232px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1969.7999439239525" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="107.19999694824232px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Senaryosuz ve Doğal Başlamalı:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="2103.7999401092557" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="107.19999694824232px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Önceden planlanmış değil, aniden başlayan ve doğaçlama yapılan bir teknik olmalıdır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(15970.12388276004 19707.40048888464) rotate(0 3503.9999389648438 2388.000183179486)">
        <path d="M32 0 C1945.82 -23.88, 3860.29 -23.7, 6976 0 M32 0 C2634.14 -14.62, 5235.74 -14.24, 6976 0 M6976 0 C6998.65 -0.46, 7008.59 10.32, 7008 32 M6976 0 C6997.83 -1.71, 7010.27 12.68, 7008 32 M7008 32 C7005.85 1616.99, 7005.44 3204.06, 7008 4744 M7008 32 C7003.01 1164.3, 7003.35 2297.26, 7008 4744 M7008 4744 C7009.8 4765.28, 6997.43 4777.84, 6976 4776 M7008 4744 C7009.37 4763.81, 6995.79 4773.72, 6976 4776 M6976 4776 C4289.99 4761.71, 1604.07 4761.63, 32 4776 M6976 4776 C5163.92 4769.76, 3352.55 4769.26, 32 4776 M32 4776 C8.91 4774.54, -0.41 4764.83, 0 4744 M32 4776 C10.41 4775.9, -1.62 4764.77, 0 4744 M0 4744 C-2.99 3161.25, -1.72 1578.76, 0 32 M0 4744 C-9.2 3332.47, -8.73 1921.62, 0 32 M0 32 C-0.24 12.18, 11.12 1.92, 32 0 M0 32 C1.26 9.93, 12.32 -0.05, 32 0" stroke="#b86200" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
        </path>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(23878.124065865508 20413.399939568233) rotate(0 3002.768310546875 1810.5863163389022)">
        <text x="0" y="97.49310934132554" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.42069639008633px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="236.76897982893342" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.42069639008633px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="376.04485031654133" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.42069639008633px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Uygulama Adımları:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="515.3207208041492" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.42069639008633px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Zayıf Görüşü Savun:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="654.5965912917571" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.42069639008633px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Az kabul gören veya düşük ihtimalli bir görüşü, güçlü argümanlarla savun.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="793.872461779365" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.42069639008633px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="933.148332266973" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.42069639008633px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Yeni Gerekçeler Üret:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1072.4242027545808" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.42069639008633px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu görüşü desteklemek için yaratıcı ve daha önce düşünülmemiş nedenler bul.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1211.7000732421889" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.42069639008633px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1350.9759437297967" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.42069639008633px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Farklı Senaryolar Yarat:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1490.2518142174047" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.42069639008633px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Analiz sürecine katkı sağlamak için bu görüş çerçevesinde alternatif senaryolar oluştur.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1629.5276847050127" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.42069639008633px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1768.8035551926205" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.42069639008633px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Çerçeveyi Güçlendir:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1908.0794256802283" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.42069639008633px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu teknik, düşünce sınırlarını genişletir ve karar sürecindeki varsayımları sorgulatır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="2047.3552961678363" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.42069639008633px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="2186.6311666554443" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.42069639008633px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Dikkat Edilmesi Gerekenler:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="2325.907037143052" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.42069639008633px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Samimiyet Şarttır:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="2465.18290763066" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.42069639008633px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Görüşü sadece "göstermelik" savunmak süreci değersizleştirir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="2604.4587781182677" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.42069639008633px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="2743.734648605876" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.42069639008633px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          İnançla Savunmak Zordur:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="2883.0105190934837" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.42069639008633px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Kişinin gerçekten katılmadığı bir fikri güçlü şekilde savunması psikolojik olarak zor olabilir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="3022.2863895810915" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.42069639008633px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="3161.5622600686997" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.42069639008633px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Rutinleştirilmemeli:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="3300.8381305563075" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.42069639008633px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Her seferinde aynı şekilde yapılırsa teknik etkisini yitirir ve yaratıcı düşünceye katkı sağlamaz.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="3440.1140010439153" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.42069639008633px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="3579.389871531523" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.42069639008633px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(23876.85048004129 20007.673335226435) rotate(0 2722.5001332962147 250.0000762939453)">
        <text x="0" y="87.50002670288106" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="100.00003051757834px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="212.50006484985397" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="100.00003051757834px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Tanım:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="337.5001029968269" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="100.00003051757834px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Genel kabul görmeyen, azınlıkta kalan veya zayıf görülen bir görüşün savunulması tekniğidir. Amaç,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="462.50014114379985" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="100.00003051757834px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          ilk bakışta fark edilmeyen argümanları ortaya koyarak bu görüşü ciddiye almaktır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(23878.124065689728 23846.072510884645) rotate(0 2239.3801114906873 188.50006103515625)">
        <text x="0" y="87.96669514973956" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="100.53336588541664px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Sonuç:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="213.63340250651038" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="100.53336588541664px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Şeytanın avukatlığı, farklı bakış açılarını ortaya çıkarmada çok etkili olabilir;
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="339.30010986328114" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="100.53336588541664px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          ancak etkin kullanılması samimiyet, derinlik ve yaratıcı çaba gerektirir.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(23530.12388276004 19723.400549919796) rotate(0 3196.0000610351562 2380.0001525878915)">
        <path d="M32 0 C1373.33 18.19, 2714.33 18.88, 6360 0 M32 0 C2054.77 -8.21, 4077.76 -8.01, 6360 0 M6360 0 C6380.29 -1.77, 6391.62 9.49, 6392 32 M6360 0 C6381.25 1.49, 6390.15 9.83, 6392 32 M6392 32 C6390.87 1249.98, 6390.24 2468.86, 6392 4728 M6392 32 C6391.25 1498.51, 6391.66 2965.33, 6392 4728 M6392 4728 C6390.65 4749.64, 6382.57 4759.7, 6360 4760 M6392 4728 C6391.78 4747.22, 6382.61 4759.42, 6360 4760 M6360 4760 C4854.43 4772.19, 3349.24 4772.79, 32 4760 M6360 4760 C4766.38 4770.27, 3172.84 4770.14, 32 4760 M32 4760 C8.79 4759.59, 0.35 4749.05, 0 4728 M32 4760 C12.96 4759.06, -0.28 4747.24, 0 4728 M0 4728 C0.34 3683.03, 1.14 2637.62, 0 32 M0 4728 C-18.35 3417.5, -18.79 2107.4, 0 32 M0 32 C-1.96 11.45, 10.34 0.96, 32 0 M0 32 C-1.76 11.28, 9.31 -1.89, 32 0" stroke="#b86200" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
        </path>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(16309.624049571401 25733.035562797537) rotate(0 2716.328857421875 1984.3834160993993)">
        <text x="0" y="102.89395490885775" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="249.88531906436882" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="396.87668321987985" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="543.8680473753909" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="690.859411530902" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="837.850775686413" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="984.8421398419241" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Temel Özellikleri:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1131.8335039974352" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Rekabet Ortamı Yaratır:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1278.8248681529462" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Servisler arasında analiz rekabeti teşvik edilir, bu da farklı bakış açıları üretir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1425.8162323084573" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1572.8075964639684" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Karar Vericiye Seçenek Sunar:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1719.7989606194794" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Doğrudan “doğru” kararı verdirmez; ama daha geniş bir karar alanı sağlar.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1866.7903247749905" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="2013.7816889305016" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Güven Artışı:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="2160.7730530860126" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Farklı servisler aynı sonuca ulaşırsa, karar vericinin güveni artar.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="2307.7644172415235" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="2454.7557813970348" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Sistem İçin Gereken Şartlar:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="2601.747145552546" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Kaynak Dengesi:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="2748.738509708057" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Servislerin insan gücü ve maddi kaynakları dengeli olmalıdır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="2895.7298738635677" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="3042.721238019079" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Merkezi Yönetim:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="3189.7126021745903" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Üst düzey bir yönetici analiz sürecini yakından izlemelidir.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="3336.703966330101" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="3483.695330485612" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Zaman:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="3630.6866946411233" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Servisler arasında bilgi alışverişi için yeterli zaman olmalıdır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="3777.6780587966346" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="3924.6694229521454" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(16309.624049184687 25733.035563490892) rotate(0 2619.3173828125 2278.366144410422)">
        <text x="0" y="102.89395490885775" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Tanım:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="249.88531906436882" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Farklı analizlerin ve görüşlerin ortaya çıkması için birden fazla istihbarat
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="396.87668321987985" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          servisinin aynı konuda çalıştığı sistemdir. Amaç, karar vericilere farklı
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="543.8680473753909" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          politika seçenekleri sunarak onların daha bilinçli kararlar almasını sağlamaktır.
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="690.859411530902" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="837.850775686413" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="984.8421398419241" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1131.8335039974352" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1278.8248681529462" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1425.8162323084573" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1572.8075964639684" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1719.7989606194794" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="1866.7903247749905" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="2013.7816889305016" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="2160.7730530860126" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="2307.7644172415235" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="2454.7557813970348" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="2601.747145552546" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="2748.738509708057" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="2895.7298738635677" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="3042.721238019079" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="3189.7126021745903" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="3336.703966330101" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="3483.695330485612" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="3630.6866946411233" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="3777.6780587966346" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="3924.6694229521454" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="4071.6607871076562" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Sonuç:
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="4218.652151263168" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Çoklu Avukatlık Sistemi, doğrudan doğru kararı verdirmez; ama karar vericiye
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="4365.643515418679" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          daha çok seçenek sunarak stratejik esneklik sağlar. Rekabet, çeşitlilik ve
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="4512.63487957419" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="117.59309132440886px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          koordinasyon başarının temelidir.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(15970.123882571406 25001.418880257283) rotate(0 3492.000274658202 2716.000099182129)">
        <path d="M32 0 C2087.61 -0.25, 4142.38 -1.39, 6952 0 M32 0 C2393.64 -15.95, 4755.77 -16.05, 6952 0 M6952 0 C6974.19 0.62, 6982.32 12.46, 6984 32 M6952 0 C6972.89 0.3, 6981.98 11.24, 6984 32 M6984 32 C6998.55 1129.91, 6999.24 2226.29, 6984 5400 M6984 32 C6987.09 1761.6, 6987.13 3490.92, 6984 5400 M6984 5400 C6984.02 5419.5, 6972.09 5433.08, 6952 5432 M6984 5400 C6982.1 5422.1, 6973.63 5432.43, 6952 5432 M6952 5432 C4367.71 5457.49, 1782.54 5457.01, 32 5432 M6952 5432 C4924.25 5419.47, 2896.69 5419.59, 32 5432 M32 5432 C9.64 5432.14, 1.94 5423.21, 0 5400 M32 5432 C10.99 5432.57, -0.24 5421.39, 0 5400 M0 5400 C-7.31 4080.86, -8.34 2760.3, 0 32 M0 5400 C-0.29 3380.6, -0.78 1361.36, 0 32 M0 32 C-1.98 10.66, 11.84 0.09, 32 0 M0 32 C-0.19 10.64, 11.24 2.21, 32 0" stroke="#b86200" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
        </path>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(23878.124065364158 25320.95389199849) rotate(0 950.735595703125 83.10720648421557)">
        <text x="0" y="116.35008907790052" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="132.97153037474345px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          d) Ayna Görüntüsü Yöntemi
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(24149.20117814714 25603.9608715864) rotate(0 431.1999762641153 69.99999614677108)">
        <text x="0" y="97.99999460548075" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.99999383483514px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Temel Prensip:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(24219.601191715283 25878.21089046867) rotate(0 1723.0416605631508 178.00017154578018)">
        <text x="0" y="83.06674672136401" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="94.93342482441601px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Başkasının yerine kendimizi koyarken “Ben onun yerinde olsaydım ne
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="201.73352775188403" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="94.93342482441601px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          yapardım?” değil, “O, bu koşullar altında ne yapar?” sorusu
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="320.40030878240407" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="94.93342482441601px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          sorulmalıdır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(24219.60119162164 26365.462663458442) rotate(0 1768.799886406794 119.99999229354034)">
        <text x="0" y="83.99999460547866" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="95.99999383483276px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Kendi düşünce kalıplarımızı karşı tarafa yansıtmadan, onların bakış
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="203.99998689901963" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="95.99999383483276px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          açısıyla düşünmeye çalışmalıyız.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(24219.601191903064 26668.054132246398) rotate(0 2177.566802926929 139.40888623091814)">
        <text x="0" y="97.58622036164219" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.52710898473393px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Gehlen’e göre Hitler, düşmanın mantıksız kararlar vereceğini varsayarak
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="236.99510659255958" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.52710898473393px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          hareket etmiş ve bu nadir görülen, tehlikeli bir yaklaşımdır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(24219.60119119241 27055.528218638836) rotate(0 1625.507613452497 69.70444311545907)">
        <text x="0" y="97.58622036164219" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.52710898473393px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Başarılı Uygulama – Eizo Hori (Japon istihbaratçısı):
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(24219.601191729904 27365.110297451676) rotate(0 2116.226892985327 139.40888623091814)">
        <text x="0" y="97.5862203616422" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.52710898473394px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Amerikan ordusunun hareketlerini, General MacArthur’un yerine kendini
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="236.99510659255964" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.52710898473394px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          koyarak analiz etti.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(24219.601191817495 27814.10126224462) rotate(0 2208.236757897732 69.70444311545907)">
        <text x="0" y="97.58622036164219" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.52710898473393px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          1944’te Japon Genelkurmayı, ABD'nin Japonya’ya saldıracağını düşünürken;
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(24219.60119120434 28127.75773096791) rotate(0 1564.1677035108933 69.70444311545907)">
        <text x="0" y="97.58622036164219" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.52710898473393px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Hori, önce Filipinler’in işgal edileceğini öngördü.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(24219.601191525515 28389.706332414476) rotate(0 1901.537208189713 69.70444311545907)">
        <text x="0" y="97.58622036164219" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.52710898473393px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Amerikan uçaklarının Kyushu bölgesine odaklandığını fark etti.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(24219.6011918175 28658.07340986105) rotate(0 2208.236757897732 69.70444311545907)">
        <text x="0" y="97.58622036164219" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.52710898473393px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Çıkartma yapılabilecek sahilleri inceledi, hava koşullarını analiz etti.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(24219.601191291928 28986.28201430761) rotate(0 1656.1775684232998 69.70444311545907)">
        <text x="0" y="97.58622036164219" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.52710898473393px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Ekim sonunu en uygun çıkartma tarihi olarak belirledi.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(24219.601191467114 29314.490617754185) rotate(0 1840.1972982481093 69.70444311545907)">
        <text x="0" y="97.58622036164219" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.52710898473393px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          1 Kasım’da çıkartma, Hori'nin tahmin ettiği sahilde başladı.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(24389.138491007212 29562.393509200745) rotate(0 306.6995497080188 69.70444311545907)">
        <text x="0" y="97.58622036164219" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.52710898473393px" fill="#ff8383" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Zorluklar:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(24219.6011918175 29971.94964609389) rotate(0 2208.236757897732 69.70444311545907)">
        <text x="0" y="97.58622036164219" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="111.52710898473393px" fill="#ff8383" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Farklı kültürlerdeki insanların düşünce yapısını anlamak oldukça zordur.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(23574.125042028434 25001.41887996334) rotate(0 3099.9993896484375 2716.0000991401357)">
        <path d="M32 0 C2363.97 -4.75, 4695.67 -4.62, 6168 0 M32 0 C2287.65 -5.15, 4543.7 -4.58, 6168 0 M6168 0 C6188.24 1.8, 6200.42 9.54, 6200 32 M6168 0 C6188.92 -2.16, 6200.53 11.57, 6200 32 M6200 32 C6187.03 1880.5, 6187.04 3728.93, 6200 5400 M6200 32 C6191.88 1225.7, 6192.26 2419.39, 6200 5400 M6200 5400 C6200.59 5421.85, 6191.18 5431.27, 6168 5432 M6200 5400 C6198.04 5423.07, 6188.23 5429.91, 6168 5432 M6168 5432 C4193.12 5450.02, 2219.54 5450.36, 32 5432 M6168 5432 C4584.44 5432.01, 3001.13 5432.1, 32 5432 M32 5432 C11.5 5430.18, -1.39 5421.36, 0 5400 M32 5432 C11.02 5433.99, 0.71 5423.15, 0 5400 M0 5400 C19.05 4164.34, 17.99 2929.46, 0 32 M0 5400 C2.61 4315.35, 2.62 3229.78, 0 32 M0 32 C0.22 10.04, 10.21 0.9, 32 0 M0 32 C-1.28 10.2, 9.38 -1.46, 32 0" stroke="#b86200" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
        </path>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round">
        <g transform="translate(15667.600916465934 31179.84947251607) rotate(0 19875.550992120054 0.24959524066434824)">
          <path d="M-0.47 -1.17 C6624.74 -1.32, 33126.03 -0.05, 39751.57 0.09 M1.48 0.84 C6626.47 1.41, 33125.24 1.67, 39750.4 1.68" stroke="#d3d3d3" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
          </path>
        </g>
      </g>
      <mask>
      </mask>
      <g transform="translate(30170.600550254996 6143.34983872701) rotate(0 653.3504638671875 82.49998092651364)">
        <text x="0" y="115.4999732971191" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="131.99996948242182px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Analiz Teknikleri
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30257.60062654894 6348.349915020955) rotate(0 615.4279046630854 98.49998474121094)">
        <text x="0" y="27.57999572753907" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="31.519995117187513px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="66.97998962402346" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="31.519995117187513px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Analiz teknikleri bir sorunun anlaşılabilmesi için kullanılan teorik
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="106.37998352050785" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="31.519995117187513px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          çerçeveyi oluştururlar. Analiz teknikleri ile analizci incelediği olayı
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="145.77997741699224" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="31.519995117187513px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          anlamayı ve onu yeniden kurmayı amaçlar. Analiz teknikleri şu şekilde
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="185.17997131347664" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="31.519995117187513px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          sıralana bilir.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30278.934300710727 6776.480316728962) rotate(0 202.71426391601562 18.4285694469105)">
        <text x="0" y="25.7999972256747" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="29.4857111150568px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          a) İstatistiksel Modeller
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30330.93430084354 6857.349004513645) rotate(0 30.642852783203125 13.928569446910501)">
        <text x="0" y="19.499997225674715" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="22.285711115056817px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Amaç:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30356.062871789964 6905.866692946655) rotate(0 422.8713684082031 27.857138893821002)">
        <text x="0" y="19.499997225674715" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="22.285711115056817px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Nicel verileri analiz ederek farklı değişkenler arasındaki ilişkileri
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="47.357136119495735" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="22.285711115056817px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          ortaya çıkarmak ve eğilimleri tespit etmek.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30339.905675730257 7031.384381761514) rotate(0 42.899993896484375 13.928569446910501)">
        <text x="0" y="19.499997225674715" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="22.285711115056817px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Yöntem:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30356.062871775175 7068.241519765953) rotate(0 416.7427978515625 27.857138893821002)">
        <text x="0" y="19.499997225674715" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="22.285711115056817px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Gözlemler ve veriler, istatistiksel analizlerle davranış biçimlerine
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="47.357136119495735" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="22.285711115056817px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          dönüştürülür ve anlamlandırılır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30339.905675060334 7231.223574009384) rotate(0 61.28570556640625 13.928569446910501)">
        <text x="0" y="19.499997225674715" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="22.285711115056817px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Sınırları:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30356.06287109047 7279.955716728108) rotate(0 428.99993896484375 27.857138893821002)">
        <text x="0" y="19.499997225674715" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="22.285711115056817px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          İstatistiksel analiz, stratejik analizin temelini oluşturmaz veya onun
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="47.357136119495735" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="22.285711115056817px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          yerine geçmez.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30339.905675173617 7467.027128257252) rotate(0 49.028564453125 13.928569446910501)">
        <text x="0" y="19.499997225674715" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="22.285711115056817px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Katkısı:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30356.06287121854 7503.098553261691) rotate(0 422.8713684082031 27.857138893821002)">
        <text x="0" y="19.499997225674715" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="22.285711115056817px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Davranış modelleri sağlar ve stratejik analizi tamamlayıcı önemli bir
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="47.357136119495735" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="22.285711115056817px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          unsur olarak görev yapar.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(30218.934331179473 6711.849035097452) rotate(0 558.1666056315098 483.6666361490886)">
        <path d="M32 0 C269.95 -3.34, 506.56 -3.01, 1084.33 0 M32 0 C246.85 1.84, 460.69 1.84, 1084.33 0 M1084.33 0 C1107.43 0.03, 1118.13 12.43, 1116.33 32 M1084.33 0 C1106.99 -1.19, 1114.24 12.84, 1116.33 32 M1116.33 32 C1113.89 228.42, 1113.65 425.85, 1116.33 935.33 M1116.33 32 C1115.71 362.91, 1115.68 694.28, 1116.33 935.33 M1116.33 935.33 C1117.43 957.33, 1105.04 969.23, 1084.33 967.33 M1116.33 935.33 C1117.03 956.93, 1104.94 968.08, 1084.33 967.33 M1084.33 967.33 C847.92 967.75, 611.54 968.75, 32 967.33 M1084.33 967.33 C831.11 969.91, 578.37 969.64, 32 967.33 M32 967.33 C10.7 967.32, -1.96 957.56, 0 935.33 M32 967.33 C9.4 965.74, 2.01 954.92, 0 935.33 M0 935.33 C-1.57 702.84, -2.55 471.1, 0 32 M0 935.33 C1.69 634.92, 2.39 335.2, 0 32 M0 32 C-1.94 8.83, 11.22 -0.9, 32 0 M0 32 C-2.15 11.27, 9.42 1.99, 32 0" stroke="#39994b" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
        </path>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(31633.538420544093 6786.091009580817) rotate(0 300.2999999999993 17.5)">
        <text x="0" y="24.50000000000001" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="28.000000000000014px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          b) Hipotezlerin Karşılaştırmalı Analizi
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(31683.37175387742 6873.005384046119) rotate(0 39.240231172199856 14.863723928863692)">
        <text x="0" y="20.809213500409165" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="23.7819582861819px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Tanım:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(31703.598720126403 6920.209798223959) rotate(0 357.5 25)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bir sorunu çözmek için birden fazla hipotez geliştirme ve bunları
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          karşılaştırarak analiz etme tekniğidir.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(31683.371753877425 7038.518242168895) rotate(0 33 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Süreç:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(31703.598719877424 7109.296366493628) rotate(0 308 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Analizci, ilk aşamada bir veya birkaç hipotez oluşturur.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(31703.598719877427 7158.677551168895) rotate(0 275 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Hipotezleri destekleyecek kanıtlar aramaya başlar.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(31703.598719877427 7211.836815168895) rotate(0 357.5 25)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Yeni kanıtlarla farklı hipotezler ortaya çıkar ve bu hipotezlerin
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          doğruluğu karşılaştırılır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(31683.37175397468 7340.875912172838) rotate(0 38.5 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Yöntem:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(31703.598719877424 7391.740599230283) rotate(0 396 25)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Hipotezlerin karşılaştırmalı analizi, süreci daha kolay takip etmek için
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          genellikle görsel şemalarla desteklenir.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(31683.37175387742 7523.550705572809) rotate(0 27.5 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Amaç:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(31703.598719877427 7570.27887557281) rotate(0 341 25)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          En olası ve doğru hipotezi belirlemek için farklı olasılıkları
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          karşılaştırmak.
        </text>
      </g>
