        <use href="#image-7f3d03a8b7affd28b86a609703247c9c01f27dd8" width="772" height="1002" opacity="1">
        </use>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(36938.244279306564 6786.091009724456) rotate(0 398.97241540914183 501.99995422363276)">
        <use href="#image-f4db239c5c62dd5e9bbe9446eb2dbccba18c7ccd" width="798" height="1004" opacity="1">
        </use>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30252.6010588813 8384.237832433606) rotate(0 334.3999999999978 15.833333333333258)">
        <text x="0" y="22.166666666666565" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="25.333333333333215px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          c) Saldırının ve Kurbanın Profilinin Çıkarılması
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30298.321015946003 8507.193523594162) rotate(0 33 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Tanım:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30317.579582486578 8550.533401549661) rotate(0 385 25)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu teknik, bir olayın analizinde saldırganın ve kurbanın özelliklerini
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          inceleyerek anlamlı çıkarımlar elde etmeyi amaçlar.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30298.32101521463 8657.848943544717) rotate(0 38.5 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Kapsam:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30317.57958221463 8705.441172544717) rotate(0 374 25)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu yöntem hem devletler arası ilişkilerin analizinde hem de bireysel
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          olaylarda (örneğin cinayetlerde) kullanılabilir.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30298.32101521463 8847.848943544717) rotate(0 115.5 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          İki Boyutlu Kullanım:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30322.231858295498 8894.436247854366) rotate(0 176 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Sebep–Sonuç Analiziyle Birlikte:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30323.57591644849 8951.39768550278) rotate(0 385 25)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Profil çıkarımı, sebep–sonuç ilişkileri analizine entegre edilirse çok
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          daha etkili sonuçlar verir.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30298.321015281002 9073.619297899999) rotate(0 165 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Geleceğe Yönelik Tahmin Aracı:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30322.231858428197 9148.02443650278) rotate(0 396 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Saldırganın profiline bakarak olası kurbanlar tahmin edilmeye çalışılır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30298.321015428195 9222.42957450278) rotate(0 27.5 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Amaç:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30322.231858428197 9279.28805850278) rotate(0 324.5 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Saldırının arkasındaki motivasyonları ve hedefleri anlamak.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30325.821015428195 9345.92791350278) rotate(0 335.5 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Gelecekteki olası saldırılara dair önceden tespitte bulunmak.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(30185.9343006619 8307.848943544717) rotate(0 707.9999542236328 1182.0000457763672)">
        <path d="M32 0 C570.77 0.42, 1109.74 -0.27, 1384 0 M32 0 C481.98 -2.55, 931.64 -1.98, 1384 0 M1384 0 C1404.19 0.6, 1415.64 9.12, 1416 32 M1384 0 C1405.65 -1.54, 1417.54 8.95, 1416 32 M1416 32 C1416.94 584.3, 1416.6 1136.78, 1416 2332 M1416 32 C1412.08 501.91, 1412.46 971.54, 1416 2332 M1416 2332 C1414.35 2354.58, 1404.52 2364.95, 1384 2364 M1416 2332 C1415.18 2353.86, 1406.7 2363.03, 1384 2364 M1384 2364 C996.11 2365.62, 608.17 2365.56, 32 2364 M1384 2364 C1060.99 2365.8, 737.26 2365.85, 32 2364 M32 2364 C11.08 2362.45, -0.27 2353.93, 0 2332 M32 2364 C10.15 2365.01, -2.28 2354.64, 0 2332 M0 2332 C7.86 1822.12, 8.81 1312.74, 0 32 M0 2332 C-8.5 1695.93, -8.13 1059.7, 0 32 M0 32 C0.3 10.9, 12.64 -0.44, 32 0 M0 32 C1.25 11.04, 11.82 -0.9, 32 0" stroke="#39994b" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
        </path>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30298.321015670597 9512.153532673081) rotate(0 368.5 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Saldırının ve Kurbanın Profilinin Çıkarılması – Örneklerle Açıklama
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30306.214326148784 9568.237841081367) rotate(0 195.23046875 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          📌 Geleceğe Yönelik Profil Analizi:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30354.676648597117 9622.29272542887) rotate(0 379.5 25)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Durum: Romanya’nın savunma harcamaları üç kat artmış ve bu harcamalar
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          özellikle zırhlı birlikler ile helikopterlere yönelmiş.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30354.676648357883 9716.042726119478) rotate(0 286 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Yorum: Bu tür bir silahlanmanın hedefi kim olabilir?
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30354.676648357887 9763.00059611948) rotate(0 38.5 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Yöntem:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30386.431876190483 9815.98261367308) rotate(0 357.5 25)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Önce Romanya’nın profili çıkarılır (askeri doktrin, siyasi niyet,
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          tarihsel ilişkiler vs.).
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30386.43187635789 9893.96463011948) rotate(0 231 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Ardından uygun kurban profili oluşturulur.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30386.43187635789 9946.94664711948) rotate(0 253 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Bu profilin hangi ülkeye uyduğu analiz edilir.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30305.552046260003 10048.037187076021) rotate(0 189.73046875 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          📌 Geçmişe Yönelik Profil Analizi:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30354.67664835789 10088.72738511948) rotate(0 396 25)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Durum: Etkili bir politikacıya karşı, ortada açık bir sebep yokken medya
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          üzerinden saldırı başlatılmış.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30354.676648357883 10169.93709011948) rotate(0 38.5 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Yöntem:
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30386.431876357885 10217.660408119478) rotate(0 385 25)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Önce kurbanın profili çıkarılır (kim, hangi görüşü temsil ediyor, kime
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          zarar veriyor olabilir?).
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(30386.43187635789 10310.939778119478) rotate(0 319 12.5)">

      <g transform="translate(32190.189628866734 8382.076155197446) rotate(0 258.5 12.5)">

      <g transform="translate(32214.640978025825 8444.348882470173) rotate(0 52.23046875 12.5)">

        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(32251.825992503098 8486.848882470173) rotate(0 390.5 25)">

          Bilinmeyen bir durumu açıklamak için eylemin sonuçlarından yola çıkarak
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          nedenini bulmaya çalışan analiz tekniğidir.
        </text>

      <g transform="translate(32254.598719775826 8570.939791561083) rotate(0 385 25)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Tamamen mantıksal bir çözümleme gibi görünse de tüm unsurlar mantıksal
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#39994b" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          olmayabilir, bu nedenle dikkatli kullanılmalıdır.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(32214.640978025825 8655.030700470174) rotate(0 106 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">

      <g transform="translate(32254.598719775826 8722.530700470174) rotate(0 209 12.5)">

      <g transform="translate(32254.598719775826 8771.848882470173) rotate(0 302.5 12.5)">

        </text>

      <g transform="translate(32251.82599277583 8848.894337470174) rotate(0 379.5 25)">

          İlgili aktörlerin çıkarları, ilişkileri, tarihçesi incelenerek neden-
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#b86200" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          sonuç bağlantısı kurulmaya çalışılır.
        </text>

      <g transform="translate(32214.640978025825 8946.848882561082) rotate(0 52.23046875 12.5)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">

        </text>

      <g transform="translate(32251.825992775826 9000.712518470173) rotate(0 385 25)">

          Olay: İngiltere’ye ait bir savaş gemisi, Tunus limanına demirlemiş bir
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Tunus savaş gemisini vurup batırıyor.
        </text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(32251.82599277583 9078.667063470173) rotate(0 390.5 25)">
        <text x="0" y="17.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">
          Durum: Olay görünüşte bir kaza veya rastlantı gibi duruyor. Ortada açık
        </text>
        <text x="0" y="42.5" font-family="Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#56a2e8" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">

      </g>
      <g transform="translate(32228.371446775833 9171.167064470174) rotate(0 38.5 12.5)">

        </text>
